faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology as a good Institute?
faqs.answer: Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology boasts an impressive review rating of 4.3 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.5 for Campus Life, 4.25 for Placements, 4.5 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

placements.overview:
Established in 2012, Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology is located in Vellore, Tamil Nadu. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech and MBA/PGDM. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 13 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology courses stands around INR 1,20,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology offers placement support to its students. Notable organizations that visit the institute for recruitment include Green Ripples Pvt Ltd, Eprofess, Gouri Devi Hospital & Research Institute & Medical College (Rahul Foundation), Hakimi Techology Solutions, Hr Delcable, Process Tech Management Consultants, India Running, Hrct Management Services, Sunled Produced Llp, Shrishti Project Consultant Pvt Ltd, Education Instituteo Of Manegment And Engin
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology during placements?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A Life changing experience with great infrastructure and placements.

review_content.Placements: I am currently pursuing my final year in the civil department. The highest package offered is 6LPA. The top recruiting company is Zoho, its a very good college placement, and its top notch. Top roles offered in my college are in software development. It has a huge market value.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is very good, and the food provided in the hostel is top notch, everything is fine. Lawns are awesome. Classrooms are neat and clean. Canteen is a heavenly place where I spend most of my time. In the library, there are a lot of books. This helped me improve my knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Above average because of teaching , better placements, and average infrastructure

review_content.Placements: Mechanical department has been placed in abroad companies. In the previous year, computer science students got 66 LPA package in their offer letters. Top companies for the placements for my college are Zoho, Wipro, Tata, HCL, etc. Some of the abroad companies also offer here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lab facilities are good but not best or better. It has AC with good circulation, and laptops are good quality. One computer is damaged yet they have not changed but it's working. All the systems are not in 12th gen systems which don't satisfy some of the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: This college is only for studies, not for extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: 45 percent of students got placed from ECE department. The highest package offered is 6 LPA and the lowest package offered is 2.5 LPA in ECE for IT Sector. Many students got placed in many startup companies and some students only got placed in MNC's. Not everyone is getting knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is always neat and clean. Campus is always calm and chill. Many sorts activities are conducted here. Classrooms are good but benches and tables are damaged. Canteen does not serve quality food and food is also unhygienic. No medical facilities are available in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Nice college infrastructure. I recommend it for educational life.

review_content.Placements: Top MNCs like Zoho are conducting off-campus incubation drives in AMCET. 50% of students got their placements via college placements. They conduct proper training sessions and mock interviews for candidates and help to overcome their fear of interview as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and environment; playground available for all games like cricket, football, and volleyball. They encourage students for zonal and state-level matches for those are more likely to be sportspersons. Otherwise, they are so glad to provide more opportunities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Around 85% of students get placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, the lowest salary package is 3 LPA, and the average salary package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, HCL, and Zoho. Around 65% of students get internships in our course at Letsgrowmore and Oasis Infobyte. The roles offered are front-end development, back-end developer, web development, tester, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities of our college are good. Wi-Fi and computers are good. Since I am a day scholar, I don't know about the hostel. Food served in the canteen is good to eat.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the placements provided in our college.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students get placed every year. Various roles offered are data analyst, senior technician, software engineer, and supervisor. Our college is tied up with many MNCs to provide placements every year. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA to 8 LPA. Around 100% placements were provided to students in 2021.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a green campus surrounded by trees. More than 4 labs are provided to CSE students, along with free Wi-Fi. It has a central library with a good amount of books. Mess available in our college serves average quality food. There are two canteens within the campus. Every year, sports day and cultural programs are conducted.

description: Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology TANCET Cutoff 2025 is out for admission to MBA/PGDM for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the AI quota. The maximum TANCET cutoff required for admissions in the last round was 4772 for MBA/PGDM admission in the General category. Tabulated below is the TANCET first and last round cutoff 2025.

Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology MBA/PGDM cutoff 2025 can be seen in this section, along with the previous 2-years cutoff data, i.e., 2024, and 2023. In 2025 the last round rank for MBA/PGDM stood at 4772 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.
To view the cutoff for different categories and rounds, refer to the table below:

TANCET 2025 cutoff for Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology is available in the table below, along with last two years cutoff data.The cutoff has been released for all rounds and categories. Students preparing for admission can download the consollidated round and year-wise cutoff data to understand the cutoff trends.

Students can view the Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at Annai Mira College of Engineering And Technology was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 76945.

individual_reviews.title: Good decent college around the area.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are average. The college offers internships to everyone, but the placement percentage is only around 60%. The companies that visit our campus are TCS, HCL, and CAT. The lowest average package is 4-5 LPA, and the highest average package is 10-11 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in the college are average. The classrooms and labs are decent, and the Wi-Fi is good. The library is above average. The quality of everything in the college is decent, but the hostel is below average. The canteen is great, and the food is great. The food for hostelers is very basic, not good nor bad. The sports facilities are also average, but there are very few events in the college.

admission_overview.college_name: BIT Maharashtra Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: BIT Maharashtra Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: BIT Maharashtra admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The institute considers scores in national or state-level entrance exams for admission to UG and PG courses.Ballarpur Institute of Technologyoffers courses at UG, PG and diploma levels in Engineering, Management and Computer Application streams. BTech and MBA are the popular BIT programmes. Interested can apply online to get in touch with the institute.

The institute offers admission to UG and PG courses based on entrance exam scores in CAT, MAT, MHT CET, JEE Main, etc. Aspirants are required to appear for the accepted entrance test and then fill out the institute's website to connect with the admission team. Aspirants should also fulfil the eligibility criteria specified by the institute for admission. Below are the topBIT Maharashtra coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)
Work experience is preferred but not mandatory
Note:In the absence of information for MCA and MTech, eligibility is taken as given for MAH MCA CET and MHT CET MTech, respectively. The selection criteria is taken from unofficial sources.

BIT Maharashtra admissions are currently open for all the courses. Aspirants have to fulfil both the eligibility and selection requirements to get a seat in the institute. Aspirants have to fill out the application form to participate in the admission process. Below are the steps to get a seat in the institute:
Step 1: BIT Maharashtra Application Process 2025

Aspirants have to first apply and appear for any of the accepted entrance exams for the preferred course. Once the aspirants have appeared for the entrance test, they can connect with the admission team of BIT by filling out the form on the institute's website.
Step 2: CAP Application

Aspirants who have passed any of the accepted entrance exams are required to apply for CAP Counselling. Some of the accepted entrance exams are CAT, MAT, MAH MBA CET, MHT CET, MAH MCA CET, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses.
Step 3: Document Verification & Seat Allocation

Candidates are allotted a seat in the preferred college and course based on the rank of the aspirants in the entrance exam. The seats are offered to candidates in different CAP rounds.  Selected aspirants have to bring the specified documents for verification. Candidates need to confirm their admission at the allotted college by paying theBIT Maharashtra fee. Candidates also need to complete the onboarding process at the allotted college. Below are the documents required at the time of admission:

headings.text: Steps for BIT Maharashtra Admission Process 2025

lists: Domicile certificate (if required for state quota)
Marksheets and certificates of Class 10 and Class 12
Transfer Certificate (TC) from the last attended institution
Entrance exam scorecard (e.g., JEE, CAT, etc.)
Aadhaar Card (or any other valid ID proof)
Gap certificate (if there is any gap in education)

faqs.question: Does BIT Maharashtra accept JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, Ballarpur Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores for admission to BTech programme. Candidates scoring equal or above the JEE Main cutoff for BIT are offered admission. Besides, aspirants can also get admission in BTech programme with a valid score in MHT CET. Aspirants after appearing for the entrance test need to apply for CAP Counselling for seat allotment.

reviews.review_heading: Good decent college around the area.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college are average. The classrooms and labs are decent, and the Wi-Fi is good. The library is above average. The quality of everything in the college is decent, but the hostel is below average. The canteen is great, and the food is great. The food for hostelers is very basic, not good nor bad. The sports facilities are also average, but there are very few events in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Bad college, faculty members, mess, hostel, etc. And there is no medical facility .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not good, and classes have broken chair tables. Labs has a slow PC that doesn't work. The library has proper books. Hostel condition is so bad. Mess food is the worst. There is no medical facility. There is no proper ground for games .

reviews.review_heading: Ballarpur institute of technology, review by their student .
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our department are average as the machines are a bit outdated and do not function well, but they keep renovating the labs. As the number of students available in the courses is high, we are divided into groups of 3-4 students to perform experiments.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ballarpur Institute of Technology (BIT Maharashtra).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good and every facility was available which was required like Wi-Fi, labs, dedicated classrooms, library, bus facilities for pick-up and drop, etc. Sports and other recreational activities were regularly held throughout the year.

reviews.review_heading: Mining is the best branch of the college, it is very rare in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: Bit Institute of Design provides hostel facility for both boys and girls. All the rooms are allotted on twin sharing basis with excellent furniture for every room. Hostel in the institute is self-contained with amenities like 24 hours security, solar hot water, RO facility,  24 hours water supply, wi-fi, mess facility with vegetarian food only, recreation room with television, gymnasium, laundry, and outsourced housekeeping to ensure a 24 hour alert on cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not good at providing placements for civil. Else everything is good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is quite decent here. The library is quite good, and huge labs are in working condition. Classrooms are very nice. The food served in the canteen is not much good and average, but hostel life is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good College. Value for Money.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. All facilities available. Good understanding staff. Water quality was good. Security was great. In all, HOSTEL was a fun time. We will always cherish those moments. BIT provides a well lit and good atmosphere in the Hostel. No cases of ragging were reported at my time.

reviews.review_heading: Good. Recommend to everyone.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good without any doubt. Labs was well maintained & well-equipped. Wi-Fi was also enable for the students for study purposes. 3 library was there with maximum number of books with different author & writers. Classroom was also good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for mining Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of BIT college is attractive & beautiful. All engineering labs are available. Classroom was good in condition. Teachers of BIT college are world level, well trained & qualified. HiTech labs facility for different faculty members and department are available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an awesome college, and I love it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms have good benches and desks. There is a good canteen. Dumbles are available. Quality of classrooms and boards is good. Very high-quality e-class facilities are available. I had a very good experience at Ballarpur Institute of Technology.

reviews.review_heading: Ballarpur Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: There are 4 buildings in college. In the 1st building there comes reception and other offices like principal's office, admission office, etc. Electrical department is in the second building where the students related to electrical and mass communication studies here. In the third building, computer science department, MBA and MCA are available. The fourth building is for mechanical and civil engineering students.

reviews.review_heading: Quality of faculty is good. Very good placements on year 2016. It has also other courses like mba.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very good infrastructure like they provide Wi-Fi. Labs are newly designed and uses all the latest equipments for all branch. Classrooms are good and have air duct system too. Library is good, feels like a open library. No medical facilities. College has a very big ground for playing sports. Quality of labs and classrooms are not so good. Food quality of canteen is good. Hostel rooms are quite small. No I didn't face any issue.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college, As a CS student my experience was good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is the thing where BIT lacks because 2-3 departments are in same building only. Apart from this thing Labs, Classroom and Library are pretty good. Canteen provides decent food but they have very less food options to offer. Boys hostel is within college campus whereas girls hostel is in ballarpur city.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and faculty but Infrastructure could be better.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent but not so good. There are 5 buildings and every department has dedicated floor in one of the building. There are the latest equipment and computers in laboratories. Classrooms and library is decent. Food quality of canteen is not good. Boys hostel is within the college campus. Wi-Fi facility is in first building and library only.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is average when compared to other top colleges.
reviews.review_text: College provides good facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, sports, hostel, cultural activity etc. So, the student can improve his/her skills. Canteen facility is also available where the hostel students and other staff members can take daily meals and snacks. Bus facility is available to cover the rural areas, who can not afford bikes or car to come to college can use the bus service. So, the overall college has a very good infrastructural facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college with good placements and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Our college provided good placements. Around 50% of students got placements. Students who were good at studies got placed in good companies. The average salary package offered was 2 LPA to 3 LPA and the highest salary package was 15 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Sun Pharma, Bajaj, Tata, L&T, etc. Our college provided good internships and placements in companies like Bajaj, Tata, Sun Pharma, and L&T.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had a hostel but it was not good. The girls' hostel was good in terms of environment and security. The hostel provided mess food service for which students had to pay weekly or monthly. Mess food was not good but healthy. Canteen food was much better than mess food. The library was available with more than 3000 books and 20 journals.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Bhagwan Mahavir College Of Engineering And Technology.

review_content.Placements: Overall, it is a good college in Surat. We are around 100 students in our class. Top companies like Essar and L&T come for placements. All our classmates got very good internship opportunities in well-reputed companies. We need to study smartly or study hard to pass. Otherwise, it will cost you so much for reassessment and rechecking.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is above average. They give priority to money, not to study. They want money from students for every occasion or penalty or sometimes, they take us on tours, which are expensive. They don't let us have complete entertainment. Free Wi-Fi is available on the registered mobile number at a good speed.

hostel_campus.college_name: Bhagwan Mahavir College Of Engineering And Technology

reviews.review_heading: Good university in Surat.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are provided here. Infrastructure is also very good. All departments are separate. There are many classes. Each class has 50 students. Canteen is very good and hygienic. All types of food are available here, and staffs are also good in nature, friendly, and cheaper than market.

reviews.review_heading: College is Best if You Don’t Want to Go to College and Want More Leave.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Bhagwan Mahavir University’s infrastructure is physically good and organizational structures that support the teaching and learning process. It includes buildings, classrooms, libraries, laboratories, internet connectivity, and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a hostel but it was not good. The girls' hostel was good in terms of environment and security. The hostel provided mess food service for which students had to pay weekly or monthly. Mess food was not good but healthy. Canteen food was much better than mess food. The library was available with more than 3000 books and 20 journals.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bhagwan Mahavir College Of Engineering And Technology.
reviews.review_text: Everything is above average. They give priority to money, not to study. They want money from students for every occasion or penalty or sometimes, they take us on tours, which are expensive. They don't let us have complete entertainment. Free Wi-Fi is available on the registered mobile number at a good speed.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in Surat.
reviews.review_text: There are nice facilities like a huge auditorium and hall, huge labs, apt classrooms and a library to be well-read. The quality of food and living facilities in the hostel is also good. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities like a playground, huge classrooms and labs. The canteen is common for the whole university. The quality of food served is good. Medical facilities are also available here. For sports and games, we have a different section on the university premises.

reviews.review_heading: It is good to study in this college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is above average. They give priority to money, not to study. They want money from students for every occasion or penalty or sometimes, they take us on tours, which are expensive. They don't let us have complete entertainment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good college in Surat.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar, so I don't know much about boarding facilities. But the canteen and sports facilities are well-equipped. We play all sorts of sports like badminton, cricket, basketball, and kho-kho. There is an underground sports facility.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students who want to graduate from fields like medical to engineering.
reviews.review_text: As Bhagwan Mahavir College of Engineering and Technology is located in well known Vesu area, it has everything which students need ranging from cost-friendly hostel service to private room near the college at a reasonable price. Our college has a well-maintained infrastructure like engineering workshops, computer labs, free Wi-Fi, State Bank of India branch and an ATM.

reviews.review_heading: I appreciate all the faculty and staff in Bhagwan Mahavir College.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available on the registered mobile number at a good speed. All the lab instruments are in working condition with good lab infrastructure. The library and classroom facilities are good. All sports activities and tournaments are arranged on a sports day conducted every year in winter.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bhagwan Mahavir College Of Engineering And Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is amazing as they use completely new and the latest technology. There is a huge playground for us and also a library, dancing room, lab, etc. Every classroom has air purifier.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of not having good placements in 2019.
reviews.review_text: In the labs, only a few computers work properly, and others just available for namesake. Wi-Fi facility is not available for students as it's available only for staff members.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the infrastructure, but it provides good facilities and helpful teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a Wi-Fi facility, high processing PCs, air-conditioned labs, classrooms with projectors and a library with a variety of books. The infrastructure of our college is good. The quality of the facilities provided in our hostel is average, and the quality of the food served is fine. Medical facilities are also available, and there are also sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good facility to students, the teaching staff is also of helping nature.
reviews.review_text: There is well maintained library and extra curricular activities take place every year. We even had a 100 points activities where students have to get 100 points by taking part in garious activities like robot racing and games, etc. Labs and classrooms are well maintained. The college have a canteen just behind it and the food is good there.

reviews.review_heading: Bhagwan Mahavir College Of Engineering And Technology is good.
reviews.review_text: Regarding infrastructure, it's not what you usually expect from this college because of many reasons. It has been one of the oldest universities and has an open campus, so the things are like that. However, if you come here, you will enjoy the vast campus life.

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Best for a bachelor's degree in science field.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 220 students in this Bachelor of Science course. Our college provides connections throughout, allowing us to get certified results. After completing the course, students can pursue further studies at the institute. In this Bachelor of Science course, roles offered include assistant lab partner, lab technician, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has laboratories for various departments like biotechnology, microbiology, chemistry, etc. In college library, students can peacefully study or read various kinds of books, including competitive ones. Classrooms are equipped with digital facilities for students. Hostel facilities include two meals a day with good quality. There is a B.Ed system for students. College canteens offer maggi, samosas, sambar vada, and other snacks.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Great course for aspiring IT professionals.

review_content.Placements: 60-70% of students in BCA are placed, and the starting package after graduation is between 3-4 LPA. With experience, it can go up to 25-30 LPA. All IT companies recruit BCA students. Around 30-40% of students get internships in companies like Flipkart, HCL, TCS, and Microsoft in roles like Data Analyst, Software Developer, and Data Scientist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, though I don’t live in the hostel. The course and teaching are also excellent. Wi-Fi is available only in labs, and classrooms are equipped with computers. The canteen provides good quality food.

admission_process.title: Kamla Nehru College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kamla Nehru College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Kamla Nehru College considers scores in GATE, MAH CET, and MAH MCA CET for admission to specific courses.Kamla Nehru Collegeoffers courses at the UG, PG and Doctorate levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 1 year - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 65,736. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 66,618 - 1,70,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Chennai provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering and IT & Software, and have a fee structure of around INR 50,000 to 2,00,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Plastics Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overview of CIPET College.

review_content.Placements: Every student in my class got placed in well-reputed companies. The highest package was 8 LPA, the lowest package was 4.5 LPA, and the average was about 6 LPA. L&T, Valeo, and KINGFA were among the companies. 100% of my class students got internships in various companies. The roles offered were Design Engineer and Material Engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: In the Labs, almost every piece of equipment related to polymers was available. We gained practical knowledge. About the hostel, the rooms and bathrooms were good, but the food was okay.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Manufacturing Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Insights of CIPET: IPT Chennai.

review_content.Placements: Junior engineer, supervisor, CNC operator, project manager. Likely abroad companies are recruiting recently. The highest fresher package is 10 LPA by Rather Energy Bangalore. Asian Paints company recruits our college students as brand ambassadors in the curriculum.
review_content.Infrastructure: Average food, sometimes worse, sometimes great. Contact-based food and canteen, so changing them can be easy by insisting to the college. Good menu covering snacks too. Decent living style in the hostel, no TV and other electromagnetic items are allowed. Quite hard for ventilation in summer times.

review_summary.college_name: Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Chennai Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Plastics Mould Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has strong faculty and infrastructure, but placements need improvement.

content.Placements: Engineering is one of the most sought-after fields of education in our country. Every year, lakhs of students take admission in the various engineering colleges of India and aspire to establish a career as an engineer. Due to the ever-increasing demand for the course, many engineering colleges have opened in the country to accommodate as many engineering aspirants as possible. These colleges claim to provide world-class education, infrastructure, and training to their students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has well-equipped labs specific to different courses, including computer labs and other specialised labs. Classrooms are generally decent, and some are air-conditioned and equipped with projectors for presentations. The library is well-stocked with books related to various subjects. It also provides magazines. Wi-Fi is available for students to access online resources and for academic purposes. The hostel facilities are average. The quality of food in the mess is often mentioned as a point of concern. The food in the mess is reported to be average and sometimes repetitive. There may be limited variety.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Plastics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: Mostly all the students were placed in jobs with good packages. The highest package was 15 LPA, and the lowest was 4 LPA offered in both B.Tech in Plastics Technology and B.E. in Manufacturing Engineering in the previous year for senior students. Reliance was the recruiting company. Internships were provided for all students. Many were selected for roles in design and production.
content.Infrastructure: At the Central Institute of Petrochemical Engineering and Technology (CIPET) IPT Chennai offers a good library. Infrastructure is okay. College campus is small compared to other colleges. There is no playground in college, though interested students can play sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Plastics Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overview of CIPET College.

content.Placements: Every student in my class got placed in well-reputed companies. The highest package was 8 LPA, the lowest package was 4.5 LPA, and the average was about 6 LPA. L&T, Valeo, and KINGFA were among the companies. 100% of my class students got internships in various companies. The roles offered were Design Engineer and Material Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: In the Labs, almost every piece of equipment related to polymers was available. We gained practical knowledge. About the hostel, the rooms and bathrooms were good, but the food was okay.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Manufacturing Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Insights of CIPET: IPT Chennai.

content.Placements: Junior engineer, supervisor, CNC operator, project manager. Likely abroad companies are recruiting recently. The highest fresher package is 10 LPA by Rather Energy Bangalore. Asian Paints company recruits our college students as brand ambassadors in the curriculum.
content.Infrastructure: Average food, sometimes worse, sometimes great. Contact-based food and canteen, so changing them can be easy by insisting to the college. Good menu covering snacks too. Decent living style in the hostel, no TV and other electromagnetic items are allowed. Quite hard for ventilation in summer times.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Manufacturing Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Disappointed college with good placement for me.

content.Placements: Students without a history of arrears and with a minimum percentage of 70 will be placed. The highest package in my department is 5LPA and the lowest package is 2.8 LPA. The top recruiters are ITW, Reliance, Besmark, Fanuc, an, Besmark, Fanuc, and L&T. The same applies to students without a history of arrears with an above 7 CGPA, who are working as interns in Valeo. Mostly, the roles are like marketing, design, production, and supervisor.
content.Infrastructure: Classroom and library atmosphere will be good. In labs, most of the equipment will not work. Highest qualifications of faculty are from M.Tech colleges. Faculty from testing centers and research centers are also provided. Some faculty are contract, and sometimes they provide guest faculty.

reviews.review_heading: Insights of CIPET: IPT Chennai.
reviews.review_text: Average food, sometimes worse, sometimes great. Contact-based food and canteen, so changing them can be easy by insisting to the college. Good menu covering snacks too. Decent living style in the hostel, no TV and other electromagnetic items are allowed. Quite hard for ventilation in summer times.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointed college with good placement for me.
reviews.review_text:
Classroom and library atmosphere will be good. In labs, most of the equipment will not work. 
Highest qualifications of faculty are from M.Tech colleges. Faculty from testing centers and research centers are also provided. Some faculty are contract, and sometimes they provide guest faculty.

reviews.review_heading: College with practical experience .
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are provided with basic facilities like enough tables, fans, and an LED projector. There are computer labs and separate laboratories for each subject. Hostel food is strictly average, and the facilities are too. However, the charges for food are very high, and it operates on a prepaid system. Sports activities in this college are rare.

reviews.review_heading: CIPET the institute of plastics.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel has 8 floors, lifts are available and there is a warden, assistant warden and a caretaker who will take care of students and their health. The hostel has a good floor the room looks pretty decent and affordable.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are spacious. Projectors are available in classrooms. A small library is available. The quality of food in the hostel is average. A doctor is always available in the college and hostel for medical assistance. We have various sports clubs for cricket, football, volleyball, chess, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is excellent if you can learn and observe everything on your own.
reviews.review_text: There was no Wi-Fi in our college but classrooms were very good and neat. The benches and tables were very comfortable. We had all the equipment in our lab. We had an industry running inside our campus so we could learn more. The hostel facility was good except for the food and the college ground was not so huge. Library facilities were very good and we had an e-library.

reviews.review_heading: 100% placement and satisfying course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities, such as clean drinking water, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library, are excellent. However, the hostel is not more comfortable for most students because the food in the mess is of poor quality, and the toilets and bathrooms are in poor condition. Aside from that, this hostel has excellent medical and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its placements, facilities, infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available like Wi-Fi, classroom, library, and laboratories. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. They provide healthy snacks. It provides a small playground to play certain games. The medical facility is also available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: CIPET is the best for students and placement also.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are average. Only a few books are available in the library. Classrooms are enough for studies. Poor quality of hostel. Many times food is unavailable in the mess. Medical facilities are also poor, and no ground for sports practice. Medical center time is 10-11 o clock.

reviews.review_heading: Friendly teachers, huge campus, decent placements every year.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the campus, there is a library which contains many books and journals and there is a digital library also. Labs are very neat as well as classrooms also. Decent quality of food is available in mess and canteen, there are 2doctors in the campus and sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this college is good and you have to acquire knowledge by yourself.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but small. While compared to other colleges, the campus has a good library and consists of valuable books. One can go to labs in their free time and get to know the machines. The hostel is good, and the food in the mess is not good, but the mess fees are lower. The accommodation cost is only Rs. 10,000 per semester.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good placements and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is not available. The labs are great, and the classrooms are quite good. The library is also great. In the hostel, laundry is not available and food is of medium taste and quality. Sports are not good at this college. Staff doesn't do anything for sports. If you want to participate in a competition, no one will help you. You have to participate on your own, and you have to take every step individually.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Chennai

likes.text: The top recruiting companies are Reliance, L&T, Valeo, Motherson, Dow Chemicals, etc.
CIPET provides the maximum placements, and I am working at poly plastics industries as a trainee in the design and development.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Faculty and the facilities at the college were really good.

content.Placements: Our college has a special department for on campus placements. For our course, 35% of the students get placed in this college. Average package offered in this college was between 3-5 LPA. Lot of companies visit our college for placements. Top roles offered in our course are that of technical support, sales, data etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a really good infrastructure available for our course. Entire campus has a Wi-Fi connectivity available for the students. Library of the college is well stocked along with the labs being fully equipped. Canteen food was good to eat.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Amazing place for a good career.

content.Placements: Good placement opportunities are there because I have been chosen by more than five companies. Griet is known for placements. Placement training will be given to all the students from different branches from 2-2 itself. Nearly 60-70 % students get placed every year. Average package is 6-9 Lacs.
content.Infrastructure: Peaceful infrastructure. College has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. Wi-Fi is available in the college. All the living spaces are clean and food available in canteen is do not have college hostel. Hygienic. We Mainly griet is known for placements. Placement training will be given for all the students from different branches from 2-2 itself. Nearly 60-70 % students get placed every year. Average package is 6-9 Lacs.

content.Infrastructure: The hostel has good rooms, with 4 cots in each room. They are very comfortable and have attached bathrooms. Separate washrooms are also available. Fans are also available. 2 wardens are present in our hostel. Food is not satisfactory.

individual_reviews.title: Good facilities are available in the college plus nice placement training.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024

hostel_campus.college_name: Mahendra College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and the facilities at the college were really good.
reviews.review_text: The college has a really good infrastructure available for our course. Entire campus has a Wi-Fi connectivity available for the students. Library of the college is well stocked along with the labs being fully equipped. Canteen food was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing place for a good career.
reviews.review_text: Peaceful infrastructure. College has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. Wi-Fi is available in the college. All the living spaces are clean and food available in canteen is do not have college hostel. Hygienic. We Mainly griet is known for placements. Placement training will be given for all the students from different branches from 2-2 itself. Nearly 60-70 % students get placed every year. Average package is 6-9 Lacs.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but very strict.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has good rooms, with 4 cots in each room. They are very comfortable and have attached bathrooms. Separate washrooms are also available. Fans are also available. 2 wardens are present in our hostel. Food is not satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are available in the college plus nice placement training.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is another home for us because students share a room and we get free will in hostel. The timings for entering and exiting the hostel are strictly maintained. Library facilities are available in the college. Medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for admission and it has good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities, and Wi-Fi is only for staff. Medical facilities are available at any time at our college. The food is unlimited, but the taste of the food is average. It is not comfortable to eat. Sports are always held on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of unnecessary rules.
reviews.review_text: The college has the worst infrastructure and lab areas. Equipment and components are not available in labs which make sense during lab sessions. Emergency exits are not available in any blocks. Buses and transport facilities are very bad. There are no safety measures in buildings and blocks, where students are sitting.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent teaching, good facilities, need to be improve other than that.
reviews.review_text: Good Wi-Fi facility in a hotel, but you have to register your laptop then only you can access the internet facility within the time of access. Medium lab facility. Very good medical facilities. The participation in games and sports is low because less sports materials. My rating as follows, Food: 7/10, Hostel room: 9/10, Infrastructure: 7.5/10, Library: 9/10, Labs: 5/10.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are the best things in the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college provided good facilities like lab, library, etc. Internet connections are provided. The classrooms are in good condition. There are various activities on the college and departmental sides. So we have good facilities and so on.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for improving your skills.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and the library are good and neat. The hostel food is good. The canteen is clean and neat. They encourage students who are interested in sports. The food is good, inexpensive, and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Well infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our campus Wi-Fi facilities for students is available totally 7 computer labs, 3 robotics lab with artificial intelligence and inside the campus one clinic is available and library is all so very good, well checked quality food is provided by management.

college_info.intro:
Parul University Goa extends BTech and MBA as its flagship courses.
The Parul University MBA fees structure consists of tuition fees, security deposit, admission fee, etc. with the same being followed for Parul University fee structure for BTech. For example the Parul University BTech fees are INR 5.2 Lakhs. Interested candidates can take a look below at some of the Parul University Goa popular programmes:

faqs.answer: A:    The university offers more than 15 courses in various streams such as Science, Management, Computer Application, etc. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Students can check the table below to know course-wise eligibility for some of the courses:CoursesEligibilityBScClass 12 in Science streamBTechClass 12 with a 45% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjectsMBAGraduation with a 50 % aggregate (45% for the reserve category)BPTClass 12 Examination in Science stream with Physics,  Chemistry and MathsMCAGraduation with a 50 % aggregate (45% for the reserve category)BBAClass 12 in any stream with English as a subject
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria of Parul University, Goa?

faqs.answer: A:    No, studying at Parul University, Goa is not free. Candidates must pay the course fee which ranges between INR 40K to INR 1.20 Lacs. The total fee can include multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, and more. However, the university offers several scholarships with fee waivers. Eligible candidates can avail the benefits of the scholarship programs.
faqs.question: Is studying at Parul University Goa free?

faqs.answer: A:    Parul University, Goa is considered to be moderately affordable in comparison to other private universities. The total fees for all the courses range between INR 40 K to INR 1.20 Lacs. However, the cost of studying at the university may vary depending on the type and level of the course. The total fee can include multiple components, such as tuition fees, security deposit, hostel fees, mess fees, hostel fee and more.
faqs.question: How costly is Parul University Goa?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee range for the BTech programme at Parul University, Goa is INR 5.2 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The fee might cover various academic expenses like tuition fees, laboratory charges, examination fees, library fees, and other relevant charges. It is important to note that the fee structure is subject to change, and candidates are advised to refer to the official website of the university for the latest and most accurate fee structure.

reviews_list.review_title: A well-balanced MBA experience with supportive faculty & a campus environment that adds value.

review_content.Placements: In my batch of the MBA program at Parul University, around 85–90 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered was around 10–12 LPA, and the lowest was approximately 3–4 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our MBA course included organizations such as BYJU’S, HDFC Bank, and several mid-scale companies in the finance, marketing, HR, and operations domains. Around 70–75% of students received internships. The top roles offered in our course included Business Analyst, Operations Executive, Financial Analyst, and Client Relationship Manager.

admission_process.title: Parul University, Goa Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Parul University, Goa admissionsare based on qualifying exam scores of the candidates. Aspirants can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Parul University, Goa is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Parul University, Goa Application Process 2026

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., https://goa.paruluniversity.ac.in/programs/, for admission to the various programme. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The university admits students based on merit. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: PI & Admission Confirmation

The university releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theParul University, Goa feeto confirm their seats in the university.

admission_overview.title: Sunder Deep Engineering College Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sunder Deep Engineering College admissions are offered based on student's performance in the accepted entrance exams. The college offers BTech at UG level and MBA, MCA, MTech at the PG level. Students can apply both online and offline. Sunder Deep Engineering College conducts counselling as part of its selection rounds. Aside from the entrance exam performance, students need to meet the basic eligibility as well. Interested students can go through the following page to get the latest updates for eligibility and admission process of Sunder Deep Engineering College, Ghaziabad programmes.

eligibility_selection.title: Sunder Deep Engineering College Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Sunder Deep Engineering College course admissions are subject to fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students have to submit valid scores secured in the accepted entrance exams. Additionally, the eligibility has to be met as well. For UG admissions, Class 12 is the requirement, while graduation is needed for PG admissions. Also known as SDEC, the college is affiliated to AKTU. Check the table below to know about the general eligibility and selection criteria for Sunder Deep Engineering College courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 45% (40% for reserved categories) + Physics & Mathematics as compulsory subjects + any one of the following subjects - Chemistry/ Biotech/ Biology/ Technical Vocational Subject)
courses_table.selection_criteria: Class 12 marks + JEE Main/ UPTAC*/ as per AKTU norms

courses_table.eligibility: BCA/ BCom/ BSc/ BA with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for SC/ ST) and Mathematics at Class 12/ Graduation level
BTech or equivalent in the relevant field from a recognised university with a minimum aggregate of 55-60%
Bachelor's degree with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for SC/ ST) from a recognised university
courses_table.selection_criteria: MAT/ CAT/ ATMA/ CUET - PG/ XAT/ UPTAC/ GMAT

hostel_campus.college_name: Sunder Deep Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: My review is not to take admission.
reviews.review_text: In my course, infrastructure, there are no lab sessions conducted, and they do not have proper air conditioning, they only provide a fan and a bulb. In summer, you are suffering from hot weather. The hostel mess is very poor, and the food is bad. Wi-Fi has a good network speed.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the education hub.
reviews.review_text: My college provides high quality smart board and 2 ACs in one classroom. Infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is available for hostel students. In library, more than 10,000 books are available for all courses, and one time 4 books are issued in my department. Mess food is average. Canteen is good. Medical facility is free for all students. Sports and games are played by interesting students.

reviews.review_heading: You should take admission in this college only if you want a degree at a lower fee.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college for the computer science and engineering department is good. Wi-Fi facility is available on the college campus. Labs are air-conditioned. Wi-Fi support, classrooms, and the library have fans. The food quality of the hostel mess is good, and the canteen food is also decent.

reviews.review_heading: According to the fee of our college placements and facilities are too good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our course is amazing. In our college, all the facilities like Wi-Fi, library grounds, labs, etc., are too good. In hostels food is average. Canteen food is also average. Other facilities like medical, sports, games, etc., are too good.

reviews.review_heading: Best Infrastructure and Faculty
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is the best part of the college. There are playgrounds for cricket and football, a beautiful park, and a lunch area. There is a large and open canteen area. All types of books are available in the library. Security on campus is good.

reviews.review_heading: Placement truth about Sunderdeep.
reviews.review_text: I am not a hostel student, but from my observations and feedback from hostel friends, I can say that basic facilities are provided by the college. Security personnel are present at both the boys' and girls' hostels. The quality of food in the mess is very bad, but canteen food is the best on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Truth about Sunder Deep Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: I come daily from home but according to my friends in the hostel, hostel fees are around 60,000 per year. The college canteen food is good but the mess food is very bad, according to my friends. Security-wise, it is good. A hospital is available on the college premises.

reviews.review_heading: It's totally worth it, go for it.
reviews.review_text:
Basically, the campus is really bigger than expected. The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi and computer systems are available. Hostel facility are available at good prices and mess food is also good. The sports complex is really good; there are also park and lawns available, as well as a gym in hostel
.

reviews.review_heading: Inside of Sunderdeep engineering Building.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is amazing. Sunderdeep College area is around 75 acres on the bank of Eastern peripheral expressway Dasna Ghaziabad. There is no AC in the library or classroom. Free Wi-Fi works only in the library. The classroom infrastructure is good, but the lab infrastructure is very poor. Very old and lagging computer in the labs.

reviews.review_heading: All the information is available in this review.
reviews.review_text: This college faculty is average and huge classes with around 70 students can sit properly in the class without any problem. The quality of hostel food is average but they provide you with AC rooms which are neat and clean. Sports activities are average.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was average. Some rooms had ACs while some had only fans. The food served in college canteen was good. We used to play cricket on Saturday along with other games. The lab of our college was average with internet connection.

reviews.review_heading: Students will always feel like home and family.
reviews.review_text:
Excellent facilities with Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a library with full coverage of books of separate courses.
Hostel facilitates are always awesome, as some of the students from different regions and cities with their different cultures play a vital role.

reviews.review_heading: Our college needs to improve placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure of our college is good. There is a large ground, and a lot of courses are provided in our college. Various facilities, like Wi-Fi and labs, provided are very good. I am a day scholar, but my friend said that the food served in the hostel is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sunderdeep Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the building is modernised, and it attracts students. It has a huge area covered, and still, the huge area is vacant to capture greenery all around the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing college for making a better career at the corporate levels and industry levels.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi zone in all campus. All books are available in the library, and they provide all useful books for improving our study. Medical facilities are available on the campus. There are two canteens, and sports and games are also available for enjoyment.

paragraphs: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Marwadi Education Foundation's Group of Institutions (MEFGI) provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 90,000 to 4,25,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech and B.Arch. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

faqs.answer:
A:    Marwadi Education Foundation's Group of Institutions (MEFGI) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMCACandidate must have completed BCA/ Bachelor Degree in Computer Science or equivalent with above mentioned marks (45% for SEBC/ EWS category students) as per AICTE norms.
Candidates passed B.Sc./ B.Com./ B.A. with Maths at 10+2 or at Graduation level (with additional Bridge courses as per the norms of concerned University) as per AICTE with above mentioned min marks (45% for SEBC/ EWS category students) are also eligible to apply.
The mentioned marks shall be computed on the basis of Grand Total or CGPA as shown in the final year marksheet of the University.
In case of Grade points, candidate must submit equivalence percantagecertificate from the University.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed or appeared for Class 12 or equivalent and secured the mentioned marks (40% for the reserved category).

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Batch summary and placement insight CSE (2020-24).

content.Placements: Around 80-85% of eligible students got placed from CSE batch. The highest package is 24 LPA by a top product-based company, often international/remote. Average package is 4.5 LPA - 5.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2.4 LPA - 3 LPA. Mostly service-based or regional companies visit for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are located within the campus offering single and shared occupancy. Rooms are clean, well-ventilated, and furnished with basic necessities like a bed, study table, and wardrobe. The hostel mess provides hygienic food. It provides vegetarian food with a variety of North Indian, South Indian, and Gujarati dishes. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed internet available in academic blocks and hostels, supporting seamless learning and research. University offers state-of-the-art laboratory for all departments, including well-equipped computer labs and electronic labs.

reviews.review_heading: Batch summary and placement insight CSE (2020-24).
reviews.review_text: Hostels are located within the campus offering single and shared occupancy. Rooms are clean, well-ventilated, and furnished with basic necessities like a bed, study table, and wardrobe. The hostel mess provides hygienic food. It provides vegetarian food with a variety of North Indian, South Indian, and Gujarati dishes. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed internet available in academic blocks and hostels, supporting seamless learning and research. University offers state-of-the-art...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Marwadi Education Foundation's Group of Institutions (MEFGI).
reviews.review_text: The best fast-speed Wi-Fi is available on my campus and only available in hostels. It has the best future labs. AC classrooms are available and it also has digital classrooms. The library is available, and on two floors, a maximum of 1,000 students are available at the same time. All Indian food-style canteens are available.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with college in terms of studying.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has full Wi-Fi across the campus. The labs are well-equipped, and we have large classrooms with a friendly atmosphere. There is a big library full of knowledge.  The hostel creates a homely nature and is clean. The facilities are well and good, and the mess food is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty, good placements, and good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Computer science and engineering department is equipped with modern facilities to enhance both learning and research experiences. Classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and fitted with projectors and smart boards to support interactive teaching. The central library is another strong asset, stocked with a vast collection of academic books, journals, and digital resources. Medical facilities on campus include a health center with a first aid kit, basic checkups, and emergency response support, and amb...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, good placements in 2025, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Computer science and engineering department is equipped with modern facilities to enhance both learning and research experiences. Classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and fitted with projectors and smart boards to support interactive teaching. The central library is another strong asset, stocked with a vast collection of academic books, journals, and digital resources. Medical facilities on campus include a health center with a first aid kit, basic checkups, and emergency response support, and amb...

reviews.review_heading: Journey of Marwadi University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are very good, and many types of facilities are provided in the campus area. The quality of the mess food is not that good, but sometimes we can eat there; however, we can't afford outside food every day, but sometimes it's okay.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure of college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is the best and libraries, canteens and classrooms are the cleanest areas. Marwadi University is known for its campus and infrastructure so the whole college is under CCTV and Wi-Fi connection and facilities are provided. Lake area and forest area are also there in the university.

reviews.review_heading: College has well qualified faculty and good quality facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college had good-quality infrastructure for the MBA. Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, etc. facilities were available at our college. The college was having good-quality facilities. Hostel facilities were also available at our college. Mess food was good to eat. Sports facilities were also available at our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Marwadi Education Foundation's Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available on campus like Wi-Fi, water purifier labs, and a library. Food served in the mess is average. Many clubs and societies are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best education with 100% placements.
reviews.review_text: There are many huge classrooms, along with enough computer labs. Internet access is available in all the labs. Wi-Fi is available on the entire campus. The hostel rooms are clean and big. For hostel students, there are indoor and outdoor games facilities, as well as a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good but fee is high.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi provided in our college is average for academics. Facilities are not provided in Apple IOS lab. The infrastructure of classrooms is good. Classrooms consist of projectors. The library is good. Each hostel room has 8 beds and its fee is Rs.75,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi, laboratories, classroom, and library are available. The hostel facilities are the best. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, Marwadi University is great and good to me as an engineering student.
reviews.review_text: Marwadi University provides a good Wi-Fi connection for the hostel, labs, classrooms, and library. Marwadi University is a good Wi-Fi connection only for those students who got admission to Marwadi University. It is great to me.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and an average placement ratio.
reviews.review_text: The quality of education and environment is above average. It has a good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is provided to students, and it is only accessible on laptops and tablets. The library is set up with good technology and awarded by the Guinness World Records. Classrooms are built in such a way that the students can focus on lectures easily.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good name but it is  not much supportive to students.
reviews.review_text: It has good infrastructure, and overall it gives a good experience. There are study-friendly classrooms with high-tech solutions. We also have good facilities in classrooms. Elevators are available but they only show it during admissions. After that, only 2-3 elevators work properly.

review_content.General: There are fully AC rooms. There are smart classrooms. The classes have comfortable desks and a good environment. There is an excellent WiFi range all over the college. The computer labs have the latest software installed in every system. There is a huge library having the latest edition of books, magazines, and novels. There is hostel facility for students. Those students who opt for hostel have to pay ₹85000. Hostel rooms are big and provide all facilities for the students. The quality of food is excellent and tastes like the food prepared at home. The staff members are also good and kind towards students. The medical facilities are provided to both the day scholars and the hostlers. The sports equipment is also provided for the hostlers.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college to join.

review_content.Placements: No placement is there. There is no placement in this college, and the student will have to find his placement. There are recruiting companies. No students got placements. There are no roles offered in our college till now. I'm studying for 2 years and still.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are the proper ones in this college. Library is good, according to the college. The quality of the food in the mess is just good—not so good. Hostel students always complain about hostel mess food. Hostel students always seek to eat our home food.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has the best teachers and positive learning environment.

review_content.Placements: Many top pharmaceutical companies visit our college. Companies are located in various pharmacy hub centers of the country like Chandigarh, Faridabad, Himachal Pradesh, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All teachers are highly qualified. They have a lot of experience. They have completed their master's degrees from the best universities in India like PGI Rohtak, DIPSAR Delhi, Jamia Hamdard, etc. The infrastructure of our college is the best in Gurugram. We have the best labs and air-conditioned rooms. Our college has Wi-Fi. The library has all standard books by different national and international authors. The hostel facilities are the best. The hostel provides a variety of food items every day. Our college has a music and dance academy. It has 2 coordinators. They have 10 years of experience.

answer.text: B M Group of Institutions (BMGI) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityBCACandidate must have passed Three years Diploma Program conducted by the State Board of Technical Education or any other examination recognized by the State Board of Technical Education as equivalent thereto.BBACandidates who have passed 10+2 or its equivalent with mentioned marks in any discipline can apply. Final year 10+2 or intermediate students can also applyB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering from a recognized board with minimum 50%.B.EdCandidate must have passed graduation from a recognized University/Institute.B.PharmaCandidate must have minimum age 17 years or more. Candidates who have qualified any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India equivalent to any of the above examinations are also eligible to apply.D.PharmaCandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination with pass in Chemistry, Physics, Biology/Mathematics and English from Board of School Education, Haryana, or examination froma recognized board/ university. Candidate who are in First year of the three years degree courses in science are also eligible. Must have passed regular 10+2 examination only in science academic stream. Candidate who have passed 12 years Higher Secondary Education Board Exam (Science academic stream with Physics, Chemistry, Biology) of Higher Secondary Education Board, Nepal are also eligible. Candidate who has passed from Open School education system of the Central Govt./ State Govt. institutions are eligible for admission. Candidates having pre-university examinations (new scheme) of Andhra University with Physics, Chemistry, Maths or Physics, Chemistry, Biology are not eligible.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th Std/ SSC Examination and obtained at least 35% marks (33% in case of candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes category or Kashmiri Migrants Category) at the qualifying examination.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed Master of Computer Applications (MCA) or M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT/ Software) or M.Sc. (Maths.) or M.Sc. (Physics) with the mentioned marks marks in aggregate alongwith valid GATE score in Computer Science & Engineering/IT from a recognized Institute/ University (47.5% is for SCT/ST of Haryana State.)MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Post Graduate Degree in any discipline with not less than 50% marks ( 47.5 % is for SC/ST of Haryana candidates ) in aggregate or any examination recognized by M.D. University, Rohtak as equivalent thereto.

rows: Candidate must have passed Three years Diploma Program conducted by the State Board of Technical Education or any other examination recognized by the State Board of Technical Education as equivalent thereto.
Candidates who have passed 10+2 or its equivalent with mentioned marks in any discipline can apply. Final year 10+2 or intermediate students can also apply
Candidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering from a recognized board with minimum 50%.
Candidate must have passed graduation from a recognized University/Institute.

Candidate must have minimum age 17 years or more. Candidates who have qualified any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India equivalent to any of the above examinations are also eligible to apply.

Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination with pass in Chemistry, Physics, Biology/Mathematics and English from Board of School Education, Haryana, or examination froma recognized board/ university. Candidate who are in First year of the three years degree courses in science are also eligible. Must have passed regular 10+2 examination only in science academic stream. Candidate who have passed 12 years Higher Secondary Education Board Exam (Science academic stream with Physics, Chemistry, Biology) of Higher Secondary Education Board, Nepal are also eligible. Candidate who has passed from Open School education system of the Central Govt./ State Govt. institutions are eligible for admission. Candidates having pre-university examinations (new scheme) of Andhra University with Physics, Chemistry, Maths or Physics, Chemistry, Biology are not eligible.

Candidate must have passed 10th Std/ SSC Examination and obtained at least 35% marks (33% in case of candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes category or Kashmiri Migrants Category) at the qualifying examination.

Candidate must have passed Master of Computer Applications (MCA) or M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT/ Software) or M.Sc. (Maths.) or M.Sc. (Physics) with the mentioned marks marks in aggregate alongwith valid GATE score in Computer Science & Engineering/IT from a recognized Institute/ University (47.5% is for SCT/ST of Haryana State.)

Candidate must have passed Post Graduate Degree in any discipline with not less than 50% marks ( 47.5 % is for SC/ST of Haryana candidates ) in aggregate or any examination recognized by M.D. University, Rohtak as equivalent thereto.
