individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, and if you want to complete pharmacy at an affordable price, then choose it.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in our course. The highest package is about 4-6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Abbott. 60% of students get internships in Sun Pharma, Cipla, etc. Quality assurance and clinical pharmacist roles in hospitals are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are good. Diploma in Pharmacy, Diploma in Engineering, B.Tech, M.Tech, BCA, B.Pharmacy, MBA, and so on are available. Wi-Fi has a good connection, and labs are also well maintained. The library and classrooms are also good. The quality of food is also good, but the canteen is too expensive. Sports facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I prefer everyone to take admission.

content.Placements: There are more than 80% of students who got placed in this course. These students have great knowledge about their course and they have the highest average package of 800000 per annum. And the lowest package of 300000 per annum. The top recruiting companies are IBM, Google, Infosys, and some others. The top roles they offered are junior software developer, IT project consultant, and quality project tester.
content.Infrastructure: There are fully AC rooms. There are smart classrooms. The classes have comfortable desks and a good environment. There is an excellent WiFi range all over the college. The computer labs have the latest software installed in every system. There is a huge library having the latest edition of books, magazines, and novels. There is hostel facility for students. Those students who opt for hostel have to pay ₹85000. Hostel rooms are big and provide all facilities for the students. The quality of food is excellent and tastes like the food prepared at home. The staff members are also good and kind towards students. The medical facilities are provided to both the day scholars and the hostlers. The sports equipment is also provided for the hostlers.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college to join.

content.Placements: No placement is there. There is no placement in this college, and the student will have to find his placement. There are recruiting companies. No students got placements. There are no roles offered in our college till now. I'm studying for 2 years and still.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are the proper ones in this college. Library is good, according to the college. The quality of the food in the mess is just good—not so good. Hostel students always complain about hostel mess food. Hostel students always seek to eat our home food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has the best teachers and positive learning environment.

content.Placements: Many top pharmaceutical companies visit our college. Companies are located in various pharmacy hub centers of the country like Chandigarh, Faridabad, Himachal Pradesh, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All teachers are highly qualified. They have a lot of experience. They have completed their master's degrees from the best universities in India like PGI Rohtak, DIPSAR Delhi, Jamia Hamdard, etc. The infrastructure of our college is the best in Gurugram. We have the best labs and air-conditioned rooms. Our college has Wi-Fi. The library has all standard books by different national and international authors. The hostel facilities are the best. The hostel provides a variety of food items every day. Our college has a music and dance academy. It has 2 coordinators. They have 10 years of experience.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A good college with good placements.

content.Placements: 90% of students got placement in the last academic year. 10% of which got the package between 30-40 lakhs, 30% got package between 20-30 lakhs. The average package was 12-18 lakhs. Samsung, Adobe, Nokia, Wipro, etc. are top companies. Analyst and SDE were the top roles offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: My college is in Gurgaon Haryana. I was not expecting a good infrastructure but when I visited my college for the first time it was above my expectations. College also provide medical facilities to the students. With the best recruitment, my college also provide best sports facilities.

The hostel and college have inverter facilities. The canteen is very small with a few options. Medical facilities like basic first-aid kits are available. Sports and games are ...

reviews.review_heading: B M Group of Institutions is the emerging college of Gurgaon.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. There are 3 floors at which the ground floor is for administrative purpose. The second and third floor of our college is for teaching and laboratory purposes. The college provides canteen facility. Wi-Fi facility is available, but it is very slow. Classrooms are equipped with only fans.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is far better than other colleges in Haryana who have to facilitate this course. There are no facilities of Wi-Fi there, but there are lab, classrooms and library facilities available in this college. The quality of other facilities is average here.

reviews.review_heading: Not much campus placements.
reviews.review_text:
Computer labs are being maintained on the standards pf TCS. Offered training in front end and back end technologies. Fully air conditioned connected with servers, UPS and printers and have the Wi-Fi facility. Independent mess facility at hostel. 
24*7 internet through wi-fi, power backup, security. Having a mechanised gym. Games and sports like table tennis, badminton, carrom, Chess, cricket, football, Volleyball are played by students.

reviews.review_heading: Not so good, but not so bad.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are normal, the library was good, Wi-Fi facility was normal as compared by other colleges. I have no idea about the hostel. The quality of food available in the canteen is good when compared to facilities available in the canteen. I have no idea about the medical facility. Sports and games are organised well, active and entertaining environment, and everyone enjoyed at that time.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B M Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The college provides infrastructure and facilities like labs for different departments like EGD, ET, chemistry lab, physics lab, computer lab, etc. The hostel has a mess, and the canteen is common for hostlers and college students. Sports facilities are available like cricket, badminton, basketball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the course curriculum and teachers, but more practical labs can be added.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility, library, labs, canteen, hostels, workshop and electronics, mechanical, computer science labs were good. I am a day scholar, but as per the hostelers that the food provided at the hostel was not very tasty and healthy. Sports meet is held once every year.

reviews.review_heading: It has been a bad experience due to lack of placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The strength of the students is not very high. No medical facility is available. Classroom quality is like that of government schools in the villages. The quality of food available in the canteen is not good; the prices are not reasonable.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and has less placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with highly equipped classrooms with good facilties. All the classrooms and labs are equipped with Wi-Fi facilities. The labs are almost equipped with proper facilities and required materials. However, in this college, there is a scope for improvement. The college has a big playground and a basketball court. In every semester a sports competition is organised in the college. The canteen is available with average food quality. The hostel rooms are a bit small a...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and supportive teachers. No need to think twice.
reviews.review_text: Anything and everything was available on the college campus. 24 hours Wi-Fi, surveying lab, soil lab, concrete lab and other civil and other engineering labs, etc. were available. Medical facilities, sports(cricket ground, football ground, volleyball ground, tennis table, basketball court and other indoor games), etc. were also available. Healthy food and snacks available in the canteen and hostel mess. Separate hostel rooms for boys and girls with all the facilities. A special bus was available...

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college with average placements. I don't know about current time.

review_content.Placements: I was from the ECE branch, and the placement in my course was decent. Most of my batchmates, almost 60% of them, got placed in the mass recruiting company TCS with an average package of INR 3.36 LPA. I don't remember anyone getting placed in core ECE, at least from my class.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library was good enough; it was actually very good. The sports facilities were also good; there was an indoor badminton court, a volleyball court, and also basketball. The college canteen food was okay, not bad, but the canteen area was small. Classrooms were average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. + M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (IoT) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Shri Vaishnav Institute of Technology and Science.

review_content.Placements: Only a few students got placed in our college. Our college has tie-ups with TCS Ninja and TCS Digital. The salary package offered by TCS Ninja is 3.6 LPA. The salary package offered by TCS Digital is 7.2 LPA. Our college is for degrees, not for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for boys. Our college provides a girls' hostel in Gumastha Nagar. There is no network on campus. Our college provides Wi-Fi. Our canteen is average.
review_content.Faculty: Some teachers have vast knowledge about their subjects, but some teachers don't have clue about their subjects. Some teachers are Ph.D. holders while some are pursuing masters from the same college. All exams are very easy. We have to read the study materials that are provided by teachers.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Vaishnav Institute of Technology and Science Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Robotics and Automation - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is a good college if you want to go MNCs. But in this college, crowd is very much.

content.Placements: The very first thing that I want to tell you about the college is that it has no placements. Actually, this college was good in the past. But now the condition has become worse in this college. TCS is the only main MNC that visits our college. This company has a bond of 10 years with our college, that's why TCS visits our campus otherwise, only small startups come for the placements. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the lowest salary is 3 LPA. Top recruiting company is only TCS.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good. We have good labs. There is a good library. We have Wi-Fi available at the college but Wi-Fi network is poor. On college campus, you have no network for calling to each other. Hostel is so far from the college. That's why we need to travel 15 KM.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering + MBA - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Mechanical in SVVV is a good idea or not!

content.Placements: As admission in mechanical engineering is low, everyone is getting jobs easily, but I will personally suggest you take our college when you are interested in taking a government job. You will get lots of opportunities and time to prepare. Internships are easily available .
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is above average. Wi-Fi is there, which works. Lavs doesn't work mostly. Classrooms are there. The library is the best part of the whole college; the aesthetics are real and you can study. The canteen is average. Medical facilities are available. Games and sports are also there .

content.Infrastructure: The library was good enough; it was actually very good. The sports facilities were also good; there was an indoor badminton court, a volleyball court, and also basketball. The college canteen food was okay, not bad, but the canteen area was small. Classrooms were average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering + MBA - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: College is an absolutely good and environment of college is also great.

content.Placements: About 25 % of students were placed from my stream. Package vary from 2 to 8 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies are tcs, wipro, byjus etc. 25% of students get internship from my stream. Each and every information about programming language we learn in college.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Vaishnav Institute of Technology and Science Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college if you want to go MNCs. But in this college, crowd is very much.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good. We have good labs. There is a good library. We have Wi-Fi available at the college but Wi-Fi network is poor. On college campus, you have no network for calling to each other. Hostel is so far from the college. That's why we need to travel 15 KM.

reviews.review_heading: Mechanical in SVVV is a good idea or not!
reviews.review_text:
College infrastructure is above average. Wi-Fi is there, which works. Lavs doesn't work mostly. Classrooms are there. The library is the best part of the whole college; the aesthetics are real and you can study. The canteen is average. Medical facilities are available. Games and sports are also there 
.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with average placements. I don't know about current time.
reviews.review_text: The library was good enough; it was actually very good. The sports facilities were also good; there was an indoor badminton court, a volleyball court, and also basketball. The college canteen food was okay, not bad, but the canteen area was small. Classrooms were average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Vaishnav Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel for boys. Our college provides a girls' hostel in Gumastha Nagar. There is no network on campus. Our college provides Wi-Fi. Our canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: College is an absolutely good and environment of college is also great.
reviews.review_text: Labs and libraries are available in my college. Labs having all instruments and Wi-Fi facility. Which is usable by the students. Hostel having Wi-Fi facility and food quality is not even good there. But it's adjustable. Canteen facility is good in college. College is having medical facility and sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for studies. The campus environment is better.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and library were very good in this college. Our campus was not Wi-Fi-enabled. Sports and games were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall it is a good college with good infrastructure and labs.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for students all the time on the premises. Labs are well-equipped with instruments for the respective subjects. Different blocks are allotted to different streams. Library is quite huge and equipped with books for various courses.

reviews.review_heading: I definitely recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Labs are equipped with the necessary tools and resources. Classrooms are also wide and spacious. Wi-Fi facility was available. The library had most of the course books along with other reference books. Canteen food is also good. The sports complex is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I was not satisfied with our college in terms of placements and knowledge provided.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus was not up to the mark. It was a small campus handling the crowd of around 3000 students, including engineering, pharmacy, BBA, and architecture students. Hostel campus was big enough, but the facilities were next to nothing. The quality of the food and service was very bad.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The college building is new, but students are in massive numbers. Therefore it became packed here. There is no playground to play not even a cricket pitch. The water dispenser is rusted, and students fall sick by drinking water from the dispenser. Even many students got jaundice and fever by consuming college water. Computer labs are good. There is a Wi-Fi facility, but it is very weak. The canteen is not good, and they provide stall food. The exterior look of the college is good, but hollow fro...

reviews.review_heading: This institute is the best for studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is the best around in Indore. We have separate blocks for the different branches. We have separate blocks for sports. There is a canteen for the students, and it provides good quality food. We have a huge library where we can gain a lot of knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculties, placement is not really good, infrastructure and facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good for study. Construction of new infrastructure is also taking place. The library is quite good. No medical shop is there on the campus. The quality of food in the canteen is below average. Poor hostel rooms are there. Not a good infrastructure is provided despite having a good piece of land.

reviews.review_heading: My college was not so happening & convincing for a student to built his complete personality.
reviews.review_text: Average infrastructure, lab facilities were good but practical knowledge were not up to the mark. Teachers never took initiative to motivate the new invention or projects. Classrooms were good & spacious. Quality of food in canteen was not so good. Sports facilities were good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and the platform the college provided.
reviews.review_text: The college offers a very modern campus with numerous facilities in the college. With a full Wi-Fi main block which houses the computer Science, electronics and communication and Electronics and instrumentation departments. With a number of computer labs and other prerequisite engineering labs, it also has a number of sports facility namely cricket football indoor tt and badminton court and a basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members in our college are good. Placements are not much for the mechanical branch.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are the best as compared to most of the private universities in Indore. There are facilities like library, Wi-Fi facility in every block, sports facilities, etc. There is various type of games played like cricket, kho-kho, kabaddi, football, basketball, chess, badminton and many more games.

Out of 584 students 356 were placed with median salary of INR 400000 and 25 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 33 students were admitted at Swarnandhra College of Engineering and Technology and 20 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 20 students 4 were placed with median salary of INR 350000. Out of 9 students 2 were placed with median salary of INR 350000.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students were placed in our course. The package offered in our course was generally 6LPA. The highest package offered was 12LPA. Top Recruiting companies were TCS, Infosys, Accenture, etc. Top Roles offered in our course were SDE, Web Developer, etc.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 82% of students were placed. The lowest package was 3 LPA, the highest reached 12 LPA, and the average was about 5.8 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: Updated systems, campus-wide Wi-Fi, and a digital library with coding resources are all features of the well-equipped computer labs. Sports and cultural activities are good, and the hostel is decent. Food in the mess is mediocre and lacks variety. Basic medical care is provided.

The top recruiting companies are Microsoft, Google, Infosys. The top roles are database administration and web development. Around 65 percent of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good around the campus. The campus is spread over 30 acres of space. The classrooms are big and neat. The labs are good. The Wi-Fi facility is also available. The library is good. The hostel facilities are good. The canteen is also available. The medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A decent college with good environment, average placements, and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: In Swarnandhra College of Engineering and Technology, around 40 percent of students get placed. In my college, the highest package is 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Amazon, Flipkart. Around 70 percent of students have internships from our course. I don't know much deep information about placements as a junior, but it seems decent.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure in our college is decent. For the IT department, classrooms, computer labs, and internet facilities are good. The labs are equipped with required systems for programming practice and project development. Library facility is available with textbooks. I am in the hostel; lunch quality is not good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Average college of Hyderabad.

content.Placements: 70% of students were placed in our course. The package offered in our course was generally 6LPA. The highest package offered was 12LPA. Top Recruiting companies were TCS, Infosys, Accenture, etc. Top Roles offered in our course were SDE, Web Developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. Wi-Fi was available in the college. Library was present in the college. Modern Computer Labs. Basic Medical Facilities were available. A Limited Sports facility was available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: MCA course information, about best college, facilities, placement, etc.

content.Placements: Approximately 82% of students were placed. The lowest package was 3 LPA, the highest reached 12 LPA, and the average was about 5.8 LPA. Top employers include Accenture, TCS, Wipro, and Infosys. Internships primarily in IT support and software positions. Negative, the company offers fewer products.
content.Infrastructure: Updated systems, campus-wide Wi-Fi, and a digital library with coding resources are all features of the well-equipped computer labs. Sports and cultural activities are good, and the hostel is decent. Food in the mess is mediocre and lacks variety. Basic medical care is provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and enjoyable faculty members.

content.Placements: Actually, this is a new course in this college. In this course, students will pass out in 2026. Now I am a student of this course. This course is the present course, so companies hire students easily. The top roles offered in this course are data developers, data analysts, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, computer labs, and a library with the necessary books. The hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms and a regular water supply. The food in the mess is average. The canteen also provides snacks. Medical help is available 24x7 with a first-aid room and doctor visits. Sports facilities like a playground, a volleyball court, and indoor games, are available. There is also a gym for both girls and boys. Overall, the environment is comfortable for both studying and staying.

The Department of Training and Placement (DTP) of PRIST University Thanjavur is known for its knowledge and tested practices that transform students by harnessing their knowledge and experiences; allowing them to become industry-ready professionals. The main objectives of the deemed-to-be University are to embed the below-listed seven elements of soft skills into their students:

faqs.answer: A:    Both PRIST (deemed-to-be) University and MSU offer full-time MBA programmes. Talking about the placements, the median pacakge offered during MBA placements at PRIST University was INR 4 LPA in 2023. The median salary package offered to MBA students at MSU ranged from INR 1.3 LPA to INR 1.5 LPA. It can be clearly seen that PRIST University has better placements for MBA students.
faqs.question: Which university offer better MBA placements among PRIST and MSU?

faqs.answer: A:    PRIST University graduates can pursue various career prospects after completing an MBA. Based on their specialisation and areas on interest, they can build a career in various industries in the private as well as the government sector. The following table contains some of the most in-demand jobs for MBA graduates of PRIST University:Job ProfilesAverage Salary (in INR)Product Manager24.7 LPAManagement Consulting7 LPAMarketing Manager12 LPAProject Manager19.1 LPASales Manager6.7 LPAMarketing
faqs.question: What are the career prospects after completing MBA at PRIST University?

faqs.answer: A:    PRIST University has not released the placement data specifically applying to its MBA placements. However, the university's NIRF Report 2024 is available. Based on the report, the median package offered during UG (2-year) placements at PRIST University was INR 4 LPA in 2023. Hence, MBA students at the university can expect to grab a salary package of around INR 4 LPA during MBA placements at PRIST University.
faqs.question: What is the average salary that I can expect after completing an MBA at PRIST University?

faqs.answer: A:    Pursuing a BCom at PRIST opens career paths leading to private/government jobs in various industries, entrepreneurial ventures, etc. Graduates can also pursue further education with courses like MCom, MBA, etc. Some job positions that BCom graduates of PRIST University can take up are listed below:AccountantBusiness ExecutiveAccounts ManagerTax ConsultantFinancial ConsultantAccount ExecutiveBusiness Consultant
faqs.question: What are the career prospects after pursuing BCom at PRIST?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: PRIST University offers full-time BTech, BArch, BA, BCom, BSc, BCA, BBA and BPharm at undergraduate level. Other than regular BTech, the deemed-to-be University offers part-time BTech programme in a number of specialisations. At postgraduate level, it offers MTech, MCA, B.Ed, MA, MBA, MCom, MSc, MOpt and M.Ed as part of academic curriculum. Other than regular UG and PG programmes, PRIST University also offers integrated programmes such as BSc B.Ed and BA B.Ed in the stream of Education, whereas BSc LLB, BBA LLB and BCom LLB programmes.

faqs.answer: A:    Fees for BSc at PRIST university is 24 K - 8.1 L. It's based on how you are joining in this college. If you join through eligibility of 10th and 12th with a minimum aggregate of 50%. So those kind of persons will have a less fees. Otherwise if you join through management quota then that students will have a high amount of fees. So its better to join through some eligibility.
faqs.question: What is the fee for B Sc. at PRIST University - Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    At PRIST University, the fees for various courses are as follows :B.Tech- 1.5 L - 8.1 L with 45 percent in graduationMBA- 1.1 L - 2 L along with 50 percent in graduationMsc- 14 K - 48 K with 50 percent in graduationMCA- 65 K and graduation 50 percentB.Ed- 50 K
faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses at PRIST University?

faqs.answer: A:    Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology course admission are based on entrance or merit-based. The university offers courses, such as BTech, BSc, BBA, MBA, M.Tech etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and Diploma courses. The university offers more than 20 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. The application process at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology is conducted online or offline.
faqs.question: Can I get into Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    PRIST University offers a full-time BCom programme at the UG-level. The university has specified an eligibility requirement for candidates seeking admission to the programme. To be eligible to pursue BCom at the university, a candidate must have passed Class 12 from a recognised board,   preferably with Accountancy, Commerce/Business Studies, Economics/Computer Science, Statistics/Business Mathematics. They must present the documents required to prove their eligibility for admission.

faqs.answer: Yes, PRIST University offers BTech in multiple specialisations. Students can choose to pursue the programme in full-time/part-time mode. The duration of the full time programme is four years while the duration of the part-time programme is 3.5 years. The BTech specialisations available at PRIST include CSE, ECE, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Mechanical Engineering, etc. The admission is provided based on the Class 12 merit of the applicants, followed by the TNEA counselling.
faqs.question: Q: Is BTech available at PRIST University?

review_summary.college_name: Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of PRIST University - Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology.

content.Placements: The college provides good placements in CSE. A good number of students got placed in my course. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. The roles offered are associate software engineer, associate system engineer etc. Very few students got internships, but many students got placed in MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: There are computer labs and a library with plenty of books for all branches. Hostel facilities are good for Chennai people. The quality of food is good in the mess. Canteen and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It has good faculty members and facilities, and I am satisfied with the teaching quality and events.

content.Placements: This is the best place to learn something new and get easily placed after graduation. Some of the top recruiting companies visit the campus, and students get placed easily. The college is very good and organises industrial visits for the students of all years.
content.Infrastructure: There are lots of facilities available in the college, like free Wi-Fi, gym, sports, library, classrooms and labs. The canteen provides some modern food and also fast food. The food is very tasty and good. Hostels are available for girls and boys.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: There is a good infrastructure for education.

content.Placements: Roles like application development associate, technical trainee and support engineer are offered in our college. Many companies visit here and recruit students as per their requirement. Students are trained well for placements so that they can easily qualify in interviews.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides the best quality education, along with proper classrooms, practical labs and library. Hostel facilities are good to stay, and there is every facility in the hostel. The hostel is nearer to the transportation location for hostellers to travel.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Nov 2022)- B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Not much satisfied. But satisfied with that college.

content.Placements: College is very good college. One of the best college in thanjavur. Placements is very good. Communication skills is very good. There will be placement training is available in prist college. Among 80 students 50 percent students will be placed every year.
content.Infrastructure: While coming to infrastructure topic. The college is having a very good building named according to engineering departments the strength in the college is also very good having Wi-Fi facilities both in the classrooms and in the hostels. The college is well-equipped with full lab infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Worth the money. If you want to study at medium fee structure in good premises, join this college.

content.Placements: 75% of our seniors got placed in reputed companies, especially from CSE department because IT companies recruited many students. All bio departments like biotech and biomedical students also get placed in India and abroad too.
content.Infrastructure: It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are non-A/C, but large and environment-friendly. The library has all books related to departments and competitive exams like GATE, etc. Medical facilities are available on campus because there is a medical college on the campus only. Canteen food is good and healthy. The hostel rooms are very good, and it is like an independent home.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to B.Tech at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: To get into PRIST University for a BTech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology offers full-time BTech courses of four years' duration. Students can get into this course based on merit + TNEA counselling. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass Class 12 (common eligibility).

faqs.question: Is B.Tech available at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, the BTech course is available at PRIST University. The university offers BTech courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enrol for BTech course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 with a 45% aggregate.  Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology admission process is merit + TNEA counselling.

faqs.question: Does PRIST have an entrance exam for BA admission?
faqs.answer: No, there is no entrance exam required for BA admission at PRIST University. The university admits students to its BA programme based on their merit in Class 12 and availability of seats. Interested candidates are required to fill out an application form in online/offline mode. Before applying, candidates must ensure that they fulfil thePRIST University BA eligibility criteria.

Students seeking admission must have passing scores in their past qualifying degree or Intermediate exams.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for M.Tech at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: The seat intake for the M.Tech programme at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology is 48. The programme is offered at the PG level and has a duration of two years. Candidates must have a graduation degree with 50% aggregate and must appear and qualify for admission. The university also considers scores of other national-level entrance exams for the final seat allotment.

faqs.question: I have scored less than 60% in 12th boards. Can I get admission in M.Tech at PRIST University?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates who score 60% aggregate in Class 12 boards are eligible for the M.Tech course at Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology. The eligibility criteria for the course is a Bachelor's degree or equivalent in the relevant field obtained at least 50% aggregate (45% in case of candidate belonging to reserved category).

faqs.question: What is the eligibility requirement for BCom admission at PRIST University?

placement_report.college_name: Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: PRIST University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2025, the median package offered during BTech and MBA placements 2024 stood at I NR 4.87 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 391 students were placed out of 435 students . Of these 55 belonged to MBA , 92 were from MTech and 244 were part of BTech program. The median salary recorded for MBA during PRIST placements was INR 4.80 LPA.

tables.context: Are there any government jobs that I can seek afte
What are the career opportunities available for BA

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BCom at PRIST University?
faqs.answer: BCom graduates can take up various job roles in the Finance sector of government organisations, such as government bank and regulatory bodies. They are also eligible for competitve exams, such as UPSC, SSC, etc., that lead to various jobs in the government sector. Tabulated below are some of the prospective government jobs for BCom graduates of PRIST University, along with their average salaries: Job Profile Average Salary Bank Probationary Officer (PO) INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may differ from student to student based on their skills and competency.

faqs.question: Does PRIST University have good placements?
faqs.answer: PRIST University has a good placement record. According to reports more than 80% of students get placed every year. Wipro, Capgemini, Mahindra, TCS, and Sunpharma were the top recruiters who participated in the placement drives. The university has a separate Training Placement cell which provides students help to secure job opportunities. The highest package offered was INR 6.5 LPA, and the minimum package was around INR 1.2 LPA.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at PRIST University for MBA?
faqs.answer: Placements for the highest package in PRIST University continuously see its highest offering set at around INR 6.5 LPA (LPA meaning Lakhs Per Annum) which is also stated by several sources. Nevertheless, it should be emphasized that this data is the result of the past year's placement drive and may not even be the highest package-offer for the year 2024. The latest updates about the highest salary package for MBA students going through the process of placement for the 2024 batch can be found at the college site or in the college admission office when the placements for the 2024 batch closes.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities available for BA graduates of PRIST Chennai?
faqs.answer: PRIST Chennai BA programme is offered in one speicalisation, i.e. BA in English. BA in English is a 3-year undergraduate degree programme focusing on English Literature as a core subject. The following table highlights some of the jobs best suited for BA English graduates: BA English Top Job Profiles Average Salary (in INR) Academic Writers 4.1 lakh Event Managers 4.8 lakh Librarians 3.4 lakh Administrative Officers 5.4 lakh Copy Editors 3.2 lakh

reviews.review_heading: Review of PRIST University - Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: There are computer labs and a library with plenty of books for all branches. Hostel facilities are good for Chennai people. The quality of food is good in the mess. Canteen and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members and facilities, and I am satisfied with the teaching quality and events.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of facilities available in the college, like free Wi-Fi, gym, sports, library, classrooms and labs. The canteen provides some modern food and also fast food.  The food is very tasty and good. Hostels are available for girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: There is a good infrastructure for education.
reviews.review_text: This college provides the best quality education, along with proper classrooms, practical labs and library. Hostel facilities are good to stay, and there is every facility in the hostel. The hostel is nearer to the transportation location for hostellers to travel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2019Offered by Centre for Distance Education, Prist UniversityReviewed on 26 Aug 2018)
reviews.review_heading: Not much satisfied. But satisfied with that college.
reviews.review_text: While coming to infrastructure topic. The college is having a very good building named according to engineering departments the strength in the college is also very good having Wi-Fi facilities both in the classrooms and in the hostels. The college is well-equipped with full lab infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Worth the money. If you want to study at medium fee structure in good premises, join this college.
reviews.review_text: It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are non-A/C, but large and environment-friendly. The library has all books related to departments and competitive exams like GATE, etc. Medical facilities are available on campus because there is a medical college on the campus only. Canteen food is good and healthy. The hostel rooms are very good, and it is like an independent home.

reviews.review_heading: Best place for entertainment.
reviews.review_text: Our University was wide enough and had a large warandha. Good environment and nice location to reach. Classroom are neat and clean. We had played a lot. Food quality is not good. Canteen is available. Labs facility available. Wi-Fi connection available. Hostellers are Requested to be safe as snakes and monkeys around you.

reviews.review_heading: Friendly faculty members for Students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is Average, Since it is located in the Highways between Trichy and Thanjavur we can't expect the high-speed internet connection even in our Mobile ! And there is no free Wi-Fi connection, But the computer lab is very good more than 200 computers are available for students in the Computer Lab.

reviews.review_heading: There are poor placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good in the semi-urban area. The classrooms are quite good. They can improve their canteens, and they can introduce new mini canteens, there is only the limited amount of food available, we can't expect good and tasty food here.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of normal teachers and some faculty.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, normal labs, classrooms. The library facility is no more in the east campus, and there are no medical facilities, sports and cultural programmes. There is no infrastructure. No good quality food is available in the canteen, and there are two or three items in the canteen. I don't know about the hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Wasted 4 years of my life in PRIST.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is a big question mark for all the students who studied in this university. To be frank, when I entered the college, the building size was so big, but after entering into it, I was shocked that we don't have current facility and lab facility. Sometimes we do not have even drinking water facility. A road size food shop is better than the canteen inside the college. There are no special events in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Fact about my college review by a last bench student.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility for the students. In my college, we have proper labs and technician, sufficient classrooms, attractive and well-equipped library. We don't have proper medical facilities. The sports performances were quite well. Allowing and conducting zonal Anna university matches. The hostel and canteen food facilities are poor.

reviews.review_heading: Worst college of my life and my career.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very huge. There are two to three buildings with four floors. There are 55 classrooms with two fans in each. There is no Wi-Fi facility. There is a huge library. No medical facilities are provided. Sports and games are not encouraged. There is a huge computer lab in the college. The labs and classrooms are of good quality. The canteen food is available, but the quality of food is very bad which spoils students health. The hostel facility is provided for boys ...

reviews.review_heading: Wastage of money, time, and talent.
reviews.review_text: The library of PRIST university is quite big and well-established. The entire campus is covered by high-speed Wi-Fi. There are no medical facilities available in the college. Only very basic first aid box is there. The classrooms are below average. On the wall of classrooms, you can easily find cracks. The college has well-established labs. The computer science lab has 1000 computers and they are fully functional. Other department labs are good enough.T he college has a canteen and it is just av...

reviews.review_heading: Complete dissatisfied due to placement. They teach from the exam's prospective, not for knowledge.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good.
High-speed Wi-Fi, air-conditioned lab, huge collections of book in the library, first aid facility in MBA block, etc. are available.
2 grounds are there- one for basketball (court) and one common for all activities.

The food quality is best for south Indian people.
Others can't tolerate that food every day.
Hostel facility is good but you have to walk 2 km every day to attend the classes because there is no transport facility inside the campus.
After 8 pm, you can't buy ...

Good academic and good scope for practical. But the placement activities is not much better although some of students was selected in campus placement with minimum salary package. One more concern about this institution is it is very far from rest of North India. You will need 12 hrs traveling from Chennai. Good academic and good scope for practical. college_info.college_name: Ponnaiyah Ramajayam Institute of Science and Technology Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Fees for BSc at PRIST university is 24 K - 8.1 L. It's based on how you are joining in this college. If you join through eligibility of 10th and 12th with a minimum aggregate of 50%. So those kind of persons will have a less fees. Otherwise if you join through management quota then that students will have a high amount of fees. So its better to join through some eligibility.
At PRIST University, the fees for various courses are as follows :
B.Tech- 1.5 L - 8.1 L with 45 percent in graduation
MBA- 1.1 L - 2 L along with 50 percent in graduation
Msc- 14 K - 48 K with 50 percent in graduation
MCA- 65 K and graduation 50 percent
B.Ed- 50 K

PRIST University MBA tuition fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 2 lakh for the entire course duration. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the institute/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. Other components included in the PRIST MBA fee structure are hostel fees, medical insurance, mess and other security deposits, etc.

Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the MEC - Mahendra Engineering College offers M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fees for MEC - Mahendra Engineering College courses range between INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

individual_reviews.title: The fee process is strict.

content.Placements: Various companies offer jobs for the students of our college through the placement package which starts from 20000k to 35LPA. Mostly top companies like Zoho Honda and more companies that have a public figure offer placement Roles according to the company policy.
content.Infrastructure: They have well developed structures labs Aero lab Aerodynamic labs and labs for PSTC Autocads PDP labs etc. We have a well infrastructure Library consisting of all sorts of books including every detail for related searches. Hostel has three to five blocks for women and boys hostel has 5 to 7blocks. They provide good labs with equipped instruments to develop our technical and practical skills.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: About our Mahendra Engineering College.

content.Placements: Up to 60% of students are placed in my course, and the package starts from 3 Lacs to 10 Lacs per annum. Companies like TCS and Wipro are the top recruiting companies. Almost 80% can get internships, and I cannot specify it. Full stack development, data analyst, and cloud computing are the top roles in our course.

The quality of the food is decent, and the facilities in the hostel environment are really clean and good. Students interested in sports and games are encouraged to participate in inter-college competitions.

paragraphs: An autonomous institute, MEC was started in 1995 . The placement statistics are improving every year and this year as high as 677 students were placed through campus placement. The placement cell at MEC takes students through rigorous training to get better placements.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at MEC - Mahendra Engineering College?
faqs.answer: As per Shiksha verified reviews, MEC - Mahendra Engineering College has an impressive review rating of 3.01 by 62 students.

faqs.question: How much in-campus salary is offered at MEC - Mahendra Engineering College to MBA/PGDM students?
faqs.answer: MEC - Mahendra Engineering College offers in-campus placement salaries in the range of INR 4.56 LPA to MBA/PGDM students.

faqs.question: What are the career opportunities for B.Tech Aerospace Engineering graduates?
faqs.answer: BTech Aerospace Engineering course opens doors for exciting career profiles in a variety of industrial fields and work with several recruiters such as airline companies, government research organizations, multinational aircraft manufacturing companies, the Indian Air Force, aeronautical laboratories, space agencies, etc. You can also enter the civil aviation industry, information technology and consulting, and automotive industries. You can work as Aerospace Engineer, Aeronautical Engineer, Aviation Engineer, Propulsion Systems Engineer, Aerodynamics Engineer, Spacecraft Maintenance Engineer, Flight Test Engineer, etc., and many more profiles. The average BTech Aerospace Engineering salary is also quite decent for recent graduates, between INR 8 LPA and INR 10 LPA . Know more about - Btech career

The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Sindhudurg Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Engineering (SSPMCOE) admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sindhudurg Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Engineering (SSPMCOE) offers various programmes at UG level. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. The fees for Sindhudurg Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Engineering (SSPMCOE) courses range between INR 1,67,703 to 2,54,448.

faqs.answer:
A:    Sindhudurg Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Engineering (SSPMCOE) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.
OR
Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognised University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Staff members are good for students who want to study. They are working to improve placements.

review_content.Placements: The college has provided a few placement opportunities in the previous years, but the quality of students was not good enough to get placed. Now, the college is working to improve the placements of college by arranging many programs such as personality development and others. Also, the college has formed a students counsel to solve the problems of students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi facility, and you can avail that facility through Jio hotspot by entering your mobile number and name. The computer labs are equipped with a good number of computers along with broadband. Most of the classrooms are equipped with projectors. The quality of labs is good enough to do experiments, and food available in the canteen is also good. Hostel rooms are also quite good. We didn't face any infrastructure related issues here. The college is located in Kankavli which is surrounded by nature from all sides. If you want to participate in extracurricular activities, then you can suggest it to the council members, and they will talk with the staff to get attention on those activities and to improve the study environment in college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: College is good to study, to gain knowledge and engineering degree. Satisfied with the teach.

review_content.Placements: Placements : There are no placements. Sometimes, the companies come, but hardly anyone is selected. The placement is not good here. Sometimes, the college sends students to different companies for interviews, but hardly anyone is selected, and those who are selected, gets an average package of Rs. 8,000 per month. The college does not provide any internship programme.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good as compared to other local colleges in this respective region, with well organized labs. They need to look out for their equipments specially in EXTC trade. As the equipments that the students are using regarding their practicals are too old now and due to this student were unable to perform practical as due to old equipments, it does not provide desired output. There is a Wi-fi in the college but signal strength of it is very weak. Canteens are good but the food they provide is average. Library is good with lot of books but it should be extended and some small amount of novels or other books and magazines need to be added. Hostels room are messy but facilities are better, apart from some exceptions.

overview_faqs.answer: Sindhudurg Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Engineering (SSPMCOE) is a reputed institute for B.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Sindhudurg Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Engineering (SSPMCOE) has a review rating of 3.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.1 on campuslife, 2.1 on placements, 3.3 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Sindhudurg Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Engineering (SSPMCOE) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges to enjoy college life.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students were in the EXTC course. The salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters were L&T and Infosys. There were no criteria for an internship. Network IT and software IT were the roles offered by companies. SSPM placements were considerable and students got placed in good companies. The SSPM College placement cell had been developing more to provide students with the best placement facilities.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library were of modern technology. The food and facilities given by the hostel were also awesome. All technology and study material were upgraded compared to other Konkan region colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure of the college is awesome, and the quality of teaching is good.

content.Placements: None of the companies visited our college to hire the students of mechanical department. Last year, students got placed with their references. A few students got placed in Mahindra and Mahindra through student's council. For the future point of view, many projects are also held in our college. For the last 2-3 years, only IT-companies visited our college and hired students. The mechanical and electrical students are not able to apply for IT jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good, and the college campus is the best. Wi-Fi facility is provided in the college and hostel. As per the requirements of the students, the sports activities are taking place. Quality of classrooms is good. Labs are also fulfilled with all the requirements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Staff members are good for students who want to study. They are working to improve placements.

content.Placements: The college has provided a few placement opportunities in the previous years, but the quality of students was not good enough to get placed. Now, the college is working to improve the placements of college by arranging many programs such as personality development and others. Also, the college has formed a students counsel to solve the problems of students.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi facility, and you can avail that facility through Jio hotspot by entering your mobile number and name. The computer labs are equipped with a good number of computers along with broadband. Most of the classrooms are equipped with projectors. The quality of labs is good enough to do experiments, and food available in the canteen is also good. Hostel rooms are also quite good. We didn't face any infrastructure related issues here. The college is located in Kankavli which is surrounded by nature from all sides. If you want to participate in extracurricular activities, then you can suggest it to the council members, and they will talk with the staff to get attention on those activities and to improve the study environment in college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: College is good to study, to gain knowledge and engineering degree. Satisfied with the teach.

content.Placements: Placements : There are no placements. Sometimes, the companies come, but hardly anyone is selected. The placement is not good here. Sometimes, the college sends students to different companies for interviews, but hardly anyone is selected, and those who are selected, gets an average package of Rs. 8,000 per month. The college does not provide any internship programme.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good as compared to other local colleges in this respective region, with well organized labs. They need to look out for their equipments specially in EXTC trade. As the equipments that the students are using regarding their practicals are too old now and due to this student were unable to perform practical as due to old equipments, it does not provide desired output. There is a Wi-fi in the college but signal strength of it is very weak. Canteens are good but the food they provide is average. Library is good with lot of books but it should be extended and some small amount of novels or other books and magazines need to be added. Hostels room are messy but facilities are better, apart from some exceptions.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: If the students work hard, then they can have good ROI.

content.Placements: Qspiders visit the campus to hire the students of all departments. For mechanical department students, Mahindra company visit the college for placements, and also, many more companies visit the college, but for the time being, they were not being allowed for that time. Also, students were allowed to show their talents at other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the computer lab is good. The Wi-Fi facility provided in the college for students is better. Sports and games facilities are good. Sports time was great for the students so that they participate in all games. Student's participation in sports was tremendous.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Sindhudurg Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Engineering (SSPMCOE) for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Sindhudurg Shikshan Prasarak Mandal's College of Engineering (SSPMCOE) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.
OR
Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from UGC/ Association of Indian Universities recognised University with at least 45% marks (40% in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) and passed 10+2 with Mathematics as a subject.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, not with the management.
reviews.review_text: The campus is quite huge and spacious. Every department is spacious enough to occupy the students, staff, offices and laboratories. The mechanical department has its own building with enough equipment. Electrical laboratories were recently equipped with new instruments and machines.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty are very supportive.
reviews.review_text: According to me, SSPM college has the best infrastructure in Sindhudurga district. As promised, there are multiple labs with the best-configured systems for the students to practice. Libraries are available with all the books. Classrooms are clean and neat. The campus has happy and friendly environment. The facilities provided to the students in hostel and college are good. Gym and swimming pool facilities are provided to the students in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: A good place to study. It has great infrastructure and experienced faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too good. Well-equipped laboratories are available. Classrooms are well-furnished. The college provides good transport facilities. The library and medical facilities are good. The college doesn't provide sports orientation but conducts sports days. The campus is well structured and has good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, it's nicely built and well-maintained. Our college has modern infrastructure. Workers daily maintain it well. Every day, workers clean the college premises. There are separate staff members to maintain the college infrastructure. Students can complain about the problems, and the management tries to solve them. Our college provides all the necessary facilities for students. Hostels are also provided with necessary facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied due to placement activities, but the faculty and infrastructure were good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is really good. Wi-Fi facility is not good enough except for computer department. Labs and classrooms in every department are good. The library is good and has many books. So, this facility is really good, and I can't deny it. I didn't stay at hostel but I heard that food provided wasn't good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this college is an okay kind of place.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good compared to the local colleges in this respective region, with well-organised labs and other equipment. The hostel mess is something to look out for. However, the hostel facilities are better, apart from some exceptions.

reviews.review_heading: To develop good career in this competitive world college is not capable to build students
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It has nice labs and equipment. The library is also good. We have a sufficient ground to play the sports. The hostel facilities are also good. A gymnasium is also available with good equipment. For the mechanical branch, a new separate building is there. The labs are also good but lack of skilled professors.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the location and the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in the college. There's a WLAN connection in the hostel for laptop users. The computer and mechanical branch labs are good. Other branches lab is average. The library is good with lots of books. The classrooms are very good. I have hardly seen any medical facilities in the college. The college does not give much importance to sports and other games. The quality of canteen food is average. The hostel rooms are bad.

reviews.review_heading: Good college to study. Discipline is maintained. Satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure. The classrooms are good. Equipment for hardware and software are good. The canteen facility is good.  All event like technical events, sports are arranged systematically. And placement was given by L&T was held in Ratnagiri. But I was not selected for that.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college to get an engineering degree.
reviews.review_text: It has a very good infrastructure, situated in a naturally beautiful region called Konkan. Wi-Fi is provided to the students' laptops who need to register their MAC addresses. The classrooms are well-structured. The college has an in-campus hostel which has a gym with trainer, a swimming pool, and a canteen with a very good quality food as it is run by chefs from a 3-star hotel. Also, the hostel students are provided with an Internet facility.

review_content.Placements: The placements at Government Engineering College, Valsad, are average, as few students get on-campus placements. review_summary.college_name: Government Engineering College, Valsad Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It Was Value of Money College.

content.Placements: If you are good in study, you get the best package. If your CGPA is above 7.50, then you get the best. The highest package is 8 Lacs per annum, and the lowest package is 1.5 Lacs per annum. It's all about your knowledge. If you answer all the questions, you get the best package; if you do not answer, you get a low package.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good. All departments are arranged in a series-wise manner, but its hostel is not good. Hostel facilities are not much good. Everyone wants good infrastructure. All electrical, chemical, mechanical, and civil departments have the same structure.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Enviornmental Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, and good placement.

content.Placements: In environment engineering branch at GEC valsad the highest package was 5.5 LPA and there are many companies like L&T and reliance and some consultancy they hire Environment engineer. In 2023 50% student of Environment branch were placed in different companies and they have good package and best career option.
content.Infrastructure: Our branch and hotel facility absolutely very nice. And college campus and surrounding area like parking and hotel facilities also good and washrooms and toilets facilities of hotel also good and daily clening bathrooms and toiltes. Our laboratory is also good and daily practical occur.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is absolutely good for students, as there is good faculty and their support.

content.Placements: The placements at Government Engineering College, Valsad, are average, as few students get on-campus placements. However, in the last few years, companies like Laurent Toubro (L&T), Reliance, etc. have approached college campuses for placements. In short, if you are good at studies and performance, you will definitely get the placements.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities at the college are very good; all departments have Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are good enough for studying. The library does not open daily as there is no librarian at the college. However, I hope this problem can be resolved soon, and you can also get the book from the library by asking for your faculty members. The hostel is good, but there is no mess, and the tiffin services are provided by some local people.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: In short GEC, Valsad is good for studies and good to build your future.

content.Placements: Hi, first of all there are 10 to 20 students who got jobs from campus placements. The company that come to our college is Reliance. It takes, I think, 6 to 7 students from chemical engineering. So placements are good here.
content.Infrastructure: Basically, there are all books available in the library but there are limited books available for the students. There is WIFI available in civil and electrical branch, but in chemical engineering it is only available for faculty and it needs password for students to access it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has friendly faculty members, and placements have increased after the covid.

content.Placements: A few students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 7.5 LPA by Reliance. All students got internships from various companies provided by our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities like drinking water, mess, food, and Wi-Fi for all branches. The hostel facilities are not good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good, friendly, and knowledgeable. They always answer our questions at any time. Some of them are very fast to complete the syllabus before, and some of them manage to complete 60-70% of the course.

reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. All departments are arranged in a series-wise manner, but its hostel is not good. Hostel facilities are not much good. Everyone wants good infrastructure. All electrical, chemical, mechanical, and civil departments have the same structure.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, and good placement.
reviews.review_text: Our branch and hotel facility absolutely very nice. And college campus and surrounding area like parking and hotel facilities also good and washrooms and toilets facilities of hotel also good and daily clening bathrooms and toiltes. Our laboratory is also good and daily practical occur.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely good for students, as there is good faculty and their support.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at the college are very good; all departments have Wi-Fi, and the classrooms are good enough for studying. The library does not open daily as there is no librarian at the college. However, I hope this problem can be resolved soon, and you can also get the book from the library by asking for your faculty members. The hostel is good, but there is no mess, and the tiffin services are provided by some local people.

reviews.review_heading: In short GEC, Valsad is good for studies and good to build your future.
reviews.review_text: Basically, there are all books available in the library but there are limited books available for the students. There is WIFI available in civil and electrical branch, but in chemical engineering it is only available for faculty and it  needs password for students to access it.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has friendly faculty members, and placements have increased after the covid.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities like drinking water, mess, food, and Wi-Fi for all branches. The hostel facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Hostel has poor facilities and the building is very old and need to be repaired like water leakage problems, drinking water problems, and sometimes sanitary water problems. Electric water heater is not provided.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides scholarship to students.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities like Wi-fi and library with all the course-related books are provided by our college. For using Wi-Fi, students need to register with the college. The labs available in the college are the best.

reviews.review_heading: It is one the best college in terms of extra-curricular activities.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities provided by our college. Wi-Fi is available 24*7 for students. The library is one of the most peaceful place in the college for studying and reading. There are many books available including various reference books.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is like a typical government college with nothing new and interesting.
reviews.review_text: Every department has a separate Wi-Fi facility. Labs are conducted as per the request of the faculty. If the faculty wants to take the lab, then only the lab is conducted. Otherwise, labs are conducted in the extra classes. In our college hostel, there is no facility for a mess, but a tiffin facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Students can join GEC, Valsad, as it has good professors and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college in each department. A library is available in our college with plenty of books. A canteen is available. A sports room is available in our college. There are separate hostel facilities available for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is really good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in all departments. Laboratories are available in all departments. The classrooms are really clean and satisfactory. A library is available for students. Hostel rooms are big and clean. 3 students share one room in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of its faculty members, placements, and hostel infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good. The mess is also available, and the food served in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: I joined the college in 2019. my experience is very good. All faculty are teaching.
reviews.review_text: In my course, all facilities are available Wi-Fi facilities, labs, classrooms, and library are available in my course. Other facilities are a cold water purifier is also available. But in a hostel, not proper cleaning by cleaning staff and light & fan facilities are not in some rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is better than other colleges. It has a large campus and the surroundings are peaceful for studying. All the required facilities are there for all the different courses. It has different departments for different branches.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for chemical engineering and other courses.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good, but the hostel does not have a canteen. There are good medical facilities for COVID effects. There are sports like cricket, volleyball, and other activities in the college. There is a NCC group.
