overview_faqs.question: Why choose Shridevi Institute of Engineering and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: Shridevi Institute of Engineering and Technology, located in Tumkur, Karnataka, appears to be a well-regarded institution with a strong focus on Engineering and Technology. The faculty of Shridevi Institute of Engineering and Technology is composed of a large number of PhD holders, with a total of 10+ teaching departments.The dedicated Placement Cell at Shridevi Institute of Engineering and Technology provides valuable training and workshops to equip students to be career-ready. The SIET Tumkur emphasises a peaceful campus environment, good infrastructure, and a range of academic programmes including both undergraduate and postgraduate degrees. The college also boasts a well-maintained library, modern labs, and good hostel facilities.

review_summary.college_name: Shridevi Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This college provides a great deal of experience in facing real-world problems.

content.Placements: 85% of people are placed in this college. The highest package is 12 LPA, the average package is 6 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, and Cognizant, among others, visit the campus. 87% of students from your course got internships at Pentagon Space, VTU, with roles offered in the technical field.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel has high-level security features at its entrance and provides excellent accommodation compared to nearby PGs. However, the food quality is very low, as the meals are consistently bland and unappetizing. On the plus side, the rooms are very hygienic due to daily cleaning by the staff.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, placements, nearby PGs, and a bus stop. Tech skills are required.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is above 65%. The highest package is between 7 LPA and 14 LPA, and the average package offered is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies in our course are Infosys and TCS. The percentage of internships provided by the college is low. They are offered in the 8th semester. The top roles offered in our course are software engineer positions.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in our course/department are good. Labs are very good, the speed of the internet is high, and the classrooms are wide enough to attend lectures. The library has a large collection of books. The quality of the hostel, mess, and canteen is good. The medical facilities, sports, and games are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am really satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: The placement of our college was very good. Many companies came to our college, like Dyshin, Infosys, etc. Preparation for placement started in the first and second semesters. They conducted many skill lab training sessions and all. Our college was also associated with PrepInsta for placement training.
content.Infrastructure: Our college was very beautiful. The infrastructure of our college was like Infosys, especially the entry gate I am talking about. The classroom arrangements were also good. Labs and practical classrooms, like the Edusat hall and seminar halls, were all well-structured. Overall, our college infrastructure was very beautiful.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members and the infrastructure is awesome.

content.Placements: About 85% of students get placed every year in our college. The highest package of our college is 11.75 LPA. The lowest package is about 4 LPA. The average package is about 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro, Accenture, etc. Top roles offered are system designing, software developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is awesome. Facilities provided are also good. The whole college has Wi-Fi. The library is also well-maintained with all kinds of books. The hostel facility is all good. The food provided is also good and healthy for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is trying hard to provide all the facilities required by the students.

content.Placements: Around 45% of the students have got placed in many companies. The package ranges between 9-3 LPA. There are many roles in which the students got selected, such as SDE, data engineer, etc. Our college facilitates internships within the campus only.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members are always available to solve the queries of the students. The infrastructure is good. We have free Wi-Fi facilities within the campus and a library where you could find lots of valuable resources. All our classrooms have ventilation, smart boards, and the best learning environment.

reviews_list.review_title: Sangam University College review.

review_content.Placements: Students who scored around 50-60% and above, and the package for each student may be around 5 LPA - 15 LPA depending on their course. They had many connections with plenty of recruiting companies in each course. I am in the textile and fashion design course, so it had very vast roles in its field.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college had the best infrastructure compared to the other colleges in the city. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus. Our classrooms were very clean. review_summary.college_name: Sangam University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has brilliant faculty members and a fantastic campus.

content.Placements: 89% of students get placed every year. The lowest package is 4 LPA, and the highest package is 19 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Acmegrade and Wipro. Top roles offered in the course are marketing, salesperson, finance, human resources, and other management jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are well-organised and classrooms are digital, including a digital board, CCTV cameras, and a big library. The infrastructure is good for students as well as faculty members. Facilities available in the hostel are a mess, water coolers, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sangam University.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in this course was very good. The highest package offered to a student was 15 LPA, and the lowest was 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies visited this college, and the percentage of students who got internships in this course was more than 20%.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in this course were very good. Wi-Fi and classrooms were present, and the library was also available. The quality of food provided in this course was very tasty. Medical facilities were available. Sports and games were also present in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Sangam University College review.

content.Placements: Students who scored around 50-60% and above, and the package for each student may be around 5 LPA - 15 LPA depending on their course. They had many connections with plenty of recruiting companies in each course. I am in the textile and fashion design course, so it had very vast roles in its field.
content.Infrastructure: The college had the best infrastructure compared to the other colleges in the city. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus. Our classrooms were very clean. The library had good books. We had clean washrooms. The hostel did not provide good things. The food was the worst. Sports were good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the college environment, no fun or extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: I am currently in 2nd year but as far as what I have heard from my seniors, the placements here are not very good. They don't provide good packages and they are not very good companies. The positions mainly provided are not satisfying the BBA passed out and are placed as trainees and something like that but here the positions which are offered are like tele caller, cashier, etc.
content.Infrastructure: If we talk about facilities, hostel, and sports facilities are not that good. The mess and canteen are still good and if I talk about medical facilities I don't know much about it but still got everything I needed in times of emergency. Hostel buildings are old and moldy and there is no Wi-Fi facility available and also for sports facility they only have cricket and basketball and they don't have any indoor games as such.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Placements are not that good but college life is great.

content.Placements: I am currently in B.Tech CSE 6th semester. Almost 90% of total students are placed but don't ask for the salary, it's just only 1 or 2 students get a good salary, other than those all get a very minimum salary like 2 LPA. Top recruiter is Sangam India as they are in the same industry as university. It is compulsory for all students to grab an internship in their 8th semester. Top roles offered are data entry and software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not that good. University has gym, mess, canteen but lacks what's inside those. Some of the rooms are well-furnished and maintained for special events and labs for tech field students are developed. Also, medical facilities are very less. Quality of food in canteen is decent, sometimes it's good and sometimes not that good. Sports facilities are not provided at all here.

admission_process.title: Sangam University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sangam University admission 2025is both merit and entrance-based. The institution accepts entrance exams to shortlist candidates for various courses. Some of the exams accepted by the institution includesGATE, CUET, and CUET-PG, etc.Sangam Universityoffers around92courses on its campus. These are available at UG and PG levels.
NOTE: Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.
lists: Sangam University Duration: The institution offers UG programmes for54 months - 4 yearsduration. For PG level courses, the duration is1 year - 2 years.

Sangam University Fees: The total tuition fee for programmes offered at UG level isINR 15,000 - 3,85,500. For PG level courses, the total tuition fee isINR 15,000 - 1,94,000. Candidates can pay the fee in the mode specified by the institution.

placement_report.college_name: Sangam University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Sangam University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to Sangam University NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Sangam University UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2022 stood at INR 2.5 LPA and INR 2.2 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during Sangam University PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 2.5 LPA .

tables.context: How are the placements at Sangam University?

faqs.question: How are the placements at Sangam University?
faqs.answer: According to Sangam University NIRF report 2023, the key highlights of Sangam University placements 2022 as compared with 2021 and 2020 are presented below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2020) Placement Statistics (2021) Placement Statistics (2022) UG 3-year median package INR 2.4 LPA INR 2 LPA INR 2.5 LPA UG 3-year total students 94 162 207 UG 3-year students placed 4 4 31 UG 4-year median package INR 2.4 LPA INR 2.4 LPA INR 2.2 LPA UG 4-year total students 38 76 106 UG 4-year students placed 27 31 88 PG 2-year median package INR 3 LPA INR 2.4 LPA INR 2.5 LPA PG 2-year total students 81 110 145 PG 2-year students placed 38 31 58

faqs.question: How are Sangam University MBA placements?
faqs.answer: Sangam University MBA placement data is not released. However, according to Sangam University NIRF report 2023, the key highlights of Sangam University PG 2-year (including MBA course) placements over the past three years are presented below: Particulars PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2020) PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2021) PG 2-year Placement Statistics (2022) Median package INR 3 LPA INR 2.4 LPA INR 2.5 LPA Total students 81 110 145 Students placed 38 31 58

hostel_campus.college_name: Sangam University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Separate hostels for boys and girls carefully designed and planned with 24/7 security. The students can choose single, double or triple occupancy including three nutritiously balanced vegetarians (breakfast, lunch, dinner) and Hi-tea in the evenings. Hostels are well equipped with modern kitchens serving vegetarian and non-vegetarian food. The stay at our campus provides a treasure of experience by developing alliance and social responsibility.

library.description: The library has a reading room equipped with over 115 national and international journals, magazines, periodicals and newspapers to fulfill and supplement the academic needs of the students. Learning aids like educational charts, CD’s, book bank facility and reprographic services are also available. Library equipped with Lib-Sys software and barcoding system. To augment students’ learning, the university has a well-stocked digitized Library. State-of-the-art software makes it convenient and quicker to search and keep track of more than 45,000 books covering over 6,000 titles.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: It has brilliant faculty members and a fantastic campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well-organised and classrooms are digital, including a digital board, CCTV cameras, and a big library. The infrastructure is good for students as well as faculty members. Facilities available in the hostel are a mess, water coolers, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sangam University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in this course were very good. Wi-Fi and classrooms were present, and the library was also available. The quality of food provided in this course was very tasty. Medical facilities were available. Sports and games were also present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Sangam University College review.
reviews.review_text: The college had the best infrastructure compared to the other colleges in the city. Wi-Fi was available all around the campus. Our classrooms were very clean. The library had good books. We had clean washrooms. The hostel did not provide good things. The food was the worst. Sports were good.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the college environment, no fun or extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about facilities, hostel, and sports facilities are not that good. The mess and canteen are still good and if I talk about medical facilities I don't know much about it but still got everything I needed in times of emergency. Hostel buildings are old and moldy and there is no Wi-Fi facility available and also for sports facility they only have cricket and basketball and they don't have any indoor games as such.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not that good but college life is great.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that good. University has gym, mess, canteen but lacks what's inside those. Some of the rooms are well-furnished and maintained for special events and labs for tech field students are developed. Also, medical facilities are very less. Quality of food in canteen is decent, sometimes it's good and sometimes not that good. Sports facilities are not provided at all here.

reviews.review_heading: My experience with Sangam University has been absolutely wonderful!
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good here, and the infrastructure is of good quality to give proper education for students. All the rooms in the hostel are in good condition, and the quality of food provided in the mess is also good. The hostel facilities are good and include Wi-Fi, single rooms, and double bedrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Building not of brick but of memories.
reviews.review_text: Everything was good about the course. I do not know much about the hostel, but I visited the hostel a few times. The hostel was good with nice facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Sangam university review of Shiksha.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available in my course. The infrastructure of the college is superb, and classrooms and the library are available, but Wi-Fi is not provided. The food in the college canteen is not tasty. Medical facilities are not available in this course. Sports and games are always happening in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the Sangam university.
reviews.review_text: All the basic and good facilities are provided in the my course . Wi-Fi and labs, as well as classrooms, are provided to all students in the college. The food quality of the canteen is so good. Medical facilities are also available. Sports and games are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and placements are available.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent, and various facilities are available. Separate departments are provided, and classrooms are well cleaned. Wi-Fi and labs are available, and the food quality is acceptable. The mess is very hygienic, and sports and games are offered. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: According to the budget, the campus is good, the staff has a good nature, and placements are average
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good with fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. There is good competition in sports and opportunities; personally, I played cricket for the university. The food tastes better, and the quality is good. The medical facility could be better, and the canteen is not good; the service is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sangam University.
reviews.review_text: The college offers excellent facilities, and the infrastructure is impressive. Both Wi-Fi and a well-equipped library are available. While the food in the canteen is not the tastiest, it is healthy. Medical and sports facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but poor facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure is available, but facilities are very poor; they provide food and Wi-Fi of poor quality, classrooms are not cleaned, and separate departments are available. A medical kit is available in college. Sports and games are conducted every semester.

reviews.review_heading: Sangam University review.
reviews.review_text: Superb facilities and infrastructure are provided in my course. Wi-Fi, classrooms, library — all facilities are available. The food quality in the college canteen is bad, not tasty. Medical facilities and services are provided to the students. Sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review is really good for this college.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi along with the labs and classrooms being good. Infrastructure is really good compared to the other in budget Universities. Also I tried the hostel but it is also good. There are some events which take place every year and there is a specific sports room do which you need permission to access.

admission_overview.college_name: SDM Institute of Technology Admissions 2026: Eligibility, Fees, Scholarships

admission_overview.title: SDM Institute of Technology Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: SDM Institute of Technology admissions are a blend of merit based and entrance-based. The institute offers various BE/BTech courses. The institute considers exam scores and they can also consider merit achieved in the last qualifying exam to shortlist students. Some of the exams accepted by SDM Institute of Technology are KCET and COMEDK UGET. Students must secure a valid score in the relevant exam and meet the eligibility. Following this, counselling is conducted and a seat is allotted to the student. Diploma holders in engineering are eligible for admission to the corresponding branch of second year of engineering.

eligibility_selection.title: SDM- Institute of Technology Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: SDM- Institute of Technology admissions are merit-based admission under management quota and entrance-based admission through exams like COMEDK and KCET to a variety of specialisations in the BE/BTech programme. Applicants must score at least 45% and above marks and reserved category students should have at least 40% aggregate marks in Physics, Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry/ Biology/ Biotechnology/ Computer/ Electronics as an optional subject from a recognized brand. Following table carries the SDM- Institute of Technology courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria-

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with Physics, Mathematics, Chemistry/Biotechnology/ Computer/ Electronics/Biology with 45% aggregate marks for general category students and 40% aggregate marks for reserved category students
courses_table.selection_criteria: COMEDK or K-CET or Management quota

faqs.answer: No, JEE Main score is not considered for admissions in the BE/BTech course at SDM- Institute of Technology. Candidates have to appear for the COMEDK and K-CET exam and fulfil the eligibility criterion for taking admission.
faqs.question: Is JEE Main score considered for admission in BE/BTech course at SDM- Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: The candidate should have passed class 12 with physics, mathematics as compulsory subjects and chemistry/biotechnology/ computer/ electronics/ biology any one as an optional subject with 45% aggregate marks for general category students and 40% aggregate marks for reserved category students.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for admission in the SDM- Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: SDM- Institute of Technology offers BE/BTech in six specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Computer Science and Engineering, Information Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering and Civil Engineering.
faqs.question: What BE/BTech specialisations are offered at SDM- Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: The students can take admission in the SDM- Institute of Technology through management quota by merit. They should have appeared and obtained a valid K-CET/COMEDK/JEE ranking score. Students meeting the eligibility criteria may fill the admission form and seek admission.
faqs.question: How can student take admission in SDM- Institute of Technology through management quota?

admission_process.title: SDM- Institute of Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: SDM- Institute of Technology Admissionprocessincludes application, selection, counselling and seat allotment. Candidates can take admission through entrance exam while merit-based admissions are done under management quota.
SDM- Institute of Technology Application Process 2026

Students interested in getting admission at SDM- Institute of Technology can submit the application form for KCET or COMEDK through the official website. Candidates download the admit card and appear for the exam. Based on the ranking of these exams, seats are allotted.
Selection Criteria and release of Merit List

For Karnataka Candidates, the admission is done through K-CET or COMEDK quota. The selection is based on the ranking scored in K-CET. For other state students, admission is done based on the COMEDK score. For NRI students/ foreign candidates need to pass class 12.
Filling the application form of SDM- Institute of Technology form
Students have to fill the admission form of the college. They can collect this form from the admission section at SDMIT college campus and get the documents verified by admission coordinator.
After confirming the seats, the candidates can fill the form and submit it along with the documents and the application fee.

SDM- Institute of Technology fee includes tuition fee, exam fee, practical fee among others.SDM- Institute of Technology total fee structurefor BE/BTech programme depends on the specialisation opted by the candidate.

courses_data.description: SDM- Institute of technology offers a four-year flagship BTech programme at undergraduate level. The institute offers BE/BTech programme in six specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Computer Science and Engineering, Information Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering and Civil Engineering. The course is divided into eight semesters. Candidate should have passed class 12 with physics, mathematics as compulsory subjects and chemistry/biotechnology/ computer/ electronics/ biology any one as an optional subject with 45% aggregate marks for general category students and 40% aggregate marks for reserved category students.

faqs.question: What is the median package of BE/BTech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science course offered at SDM- Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: The Artificial Intelligence and Data Science specialisation of BE/BTech course offered at SDM- Institute of Technology is INR 4 lakh. However, the given median salary number is taken from the official website of the college. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What are the exams accepted for taking admission in BE/BTech programme offered at SDM- Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: After fulfilling the basic eligibility criteria, the non- Karnataka students may apply to the BTech courses at SDM- Institute of Technology by submitting a valid COMEDK score and apply for admission through COMEDK counselling procedure. While Karnataka candidates can apply by submitting to the COMEDK score or K-CET score, followed by counselling.

faqs.question: How many entrance exam cutoffs will be released for admission to BTech at SDM Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: SDM Institute of Technology will release 2-3 rounds of COMEDK cutoffs for admission to BTech. The cutoffs will be released on a rolling basis, and the seats will be filled on a first-come, first-served basis. The cutoffs will be based on the following factors:The COMEDK score of the candidateThe category of the candidateThe number of seats available in the courseCandidates must visit the official website of entrance exam to read clear instructions on how to proceed with the counselling process,

faqs.question: What is the cutoff for BTech at SDM Institute of Technology for EWS and PWD categories?
faqs.answer: SDM Institute of Technology  offers admission across various specialisations of BTech through COMEDK scores followed by the counselling. In order to be eligible for admission, candidates must appear and match the round-wise and category- wise cutoff. SDM Institute of Technology BTech cutoff 2023 for Civil Engineering was 66641 for EWS and 66641 for PWD category. While the admissions are based on the scores/rank obtained in COMEDK, the last cut offs also change a lot depending on All India quota

faqs.question: Q. What is the number of seats offered by SDM- Institute of Technology for BE/BTech in Computer Science and Engineering?
faqs.answer: There are a total of 120 seats allocated for BE/BTech Computer Science and engineering at SDM- Institute of Technology. However, the given number of seats is taken from the official website of the college. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the annual fee structure of different specialisation courses of the BE/BTech programme at SDM- Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: The annual fee structure of various specialisation courses of the BE/BTech programme at SDM- Institute of Technology ranges between INR 2.2 Lacs to INR 7.44 lakh.

faqs.question: What exams are considered for the admission in BE/BTech courses in SDM- Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Candidates who wish to take admission in the various BE/BTech courses at SDM- Institute of Technology can appear for COMEDK or K-CET exam and admissions are based on the rank obtained in these exams. However, Students can also take admissions on merit-basis through the management quota.

faqs.question: What are the specialisations offered by SDM- Institute of Technology in the BE/BTech course?
faqs.answer: The BE/BTech course at SDM-Institute of Technology offers six specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Computer Science and Engineering, Information Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering and Civil Engineering.

placement_data.title: SDM Institute of Technology Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Top recruiters such as Infosys, Cognizant and Bosch visited the campus during SDMIT placement 2025 . According to the official report, SDM Institute of Technology placement rate recorded in 2024 was 80%. More than 100 companies visited and 280 offers were made.
According to the NIRF report 2025, the median package recorded during SDMIT BTech placement 2024 was INR 4 LPA .

faqs.question: Does SDM Institute of Technology offer 100% placement?
faqs.answer: According to the official data released, SDMIT BTech placement rate recorded in 2024 was 80%. During the placement drive 2023 and 2022, the placement rate was 78% and 83%. 100 companies visited in 2024.

faqs.question: What is the median package recorded during SDM Institute of Technology placements?
faqs.answer: According to SDMIT NIRF report 2025, the median package recorded during BTech placement 2024 was INR 4 LPA. During the placement season 2023 and 2022, the median package was 4 LPA as well.

faqs.question: Is SDM Institute of Technology a good college in terms of placements?
faqs.answer: SDMIT provides good placements to its students. As per the official report, the placement rate recorded during BTech placement 2024 was 80%. More than 100 companies visited and 280 offerts were made in 2024.

faqs.question: How much placements salary students get after studying in SDM Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: SDM Institute of Technology offers median package range of (aprx)INR 400,000 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance program as well. Additionally, it has been rated 3.4 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.

description: SDM Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to BE/BTech programmes via the COMEDK UGCET examination. Students can view the exam-wise sections below to know the cutoffs for various accepted examinations across different rounds, categories and quotas. Refer to the pointers below for more exam-related updates:

SDM Institute of Technology KCET cutoff 2025 has been closed for intake to B.E. / B.Tech and other courses. The cutoff was published for reserved and unreserved category students belonging to AI and HS quotas. For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the last round closing ranks were between 138284 and 248504 in the General category for the AI quota. Considering the ranks, the most challenging specialisation for admission was B.E. in Civil Engineering with the lowest cutoff rank of 138284.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Civil Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 138284 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 274505, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

hostel_campus.college_name: SDM Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Reality of SDM. Here, you can get the true butterflies.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is pretty good. Classrooms are also large. Library is the best thing in the university as it is larger than many other campuses. Quality of food is also awesome. I enjoyed my whole college life. Hope so, you will also enjoy every moment there.

reviews.review_heading: Justification of my college life.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good with properly functioning operating systems and hardware. We have a good environment to study, which helps us capture the points and remember them properly.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good college and ECE department also. They provide good content of materials to students.
reviews.review_text: In our department, they provide a very good lab facility. Whenever we go to lab during class hours, they will provide us to do the lab. Books in library are very needful and good content of textbooks are there. It provides very good food for those students who are in hostel. Our society has a hospital also and treatment is very good. Our college supports sports and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: "Student's perspective" because this review is given from the student's perspective.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, laboratory, clean and hygienic classrooms, well-maintained library with all types of books related to academics and others. The hostel has very good maintenance and hygienic food. Sports, medical facility is well, and wardens are friendly with the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but it is very strict, so think twice before joining.
reviews.review_text: SDM has good hostels. There are 4 hostels, of which 2 are for boys and 2 for girls. There are separate mess halls for boys and girls. The check-in time for boys is 6:30 PM. Breakfast is available from 7:30 AM. Lunch is available from 12:30 PM. Snacks are available from 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM. Dinner is available from 7:30 PM.

reviews.review_heading: A college with good nature and supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: The college has centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi-enabled LCD projectors. It has tutorial rooms, a library, a state-of-the-art seminar room, and a fully equipped auditorium with a seating capacity of over 750 persons. The College takes pride in being a differently-able friendly campus with new ramps, lifts, and special washrooms added to the building. Also, the College has various facilities to address the reading, hearing, and understanding requirements of various students. The ho...

reviews.review_heading: A good college with average placement.
reviews.review_text: The College has centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi-enabled LCD projectors. It has tutorial rooms, a library, a state-of-the-art seminar room, and a fully equipped auditorium with a seating capacity of over 750 persons. The College takes pride in being a differently-able friendly campus with new ramps, lifts, and special washrooms added to the building. Also, the College has various facilities to address the reading, hearing, and understanding requirements of various students. The ho...

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers many good opportunities. The placements are average.
reviews.review_text: Our college has centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi enabled LCD projectors, tutorial rooms, a library, a state-of-the-art seminar room, and a fully equipped auditorium with a seating capacity of over 750 people. The College takes pride in being a differently abled-friendly campus, with new ramps, elevators, and special washrooms added to the building. The college has various facilities to address the reading, hearing, and understanding requirements of various students. The hostel is ...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good environment to study in.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, we have all the necessary facilities. We have labs, an auditorium, a sports ground, and a place for cultural events. Many numbers of books and computers are present in our college. The classroom is equipped with projectors and smartboards.

reviews.review_heading: The college has the best environment and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available in my course. There are many labs as needed for our course, and all the equipment is available which is necessary for our experiments. Classrooms are very good. The library is beautiful and peaceful. A digital library is also available. The hostel is very good and provides hygienic food. The college canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is for students who scored KCET rank more than 35,000-40,000 for the CSE branch.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good, and labs are well-equipped with good instructors. The library is also well-equipped with many books and journals. The hostel is great. Furniture in the hostel rooms is great, and the rooms are spacious. Food provided in the hostel mess and college canteen is only vegetarian. In the hostel mess, they follow a weekly menu which consists of a variety of dishes, and the food usually consists of fewer spices.

reviews.review_heading: SDM Institute of technology is an average college.
reviews.review_text: College campus is good. When we were in the first year new hostels were being constructed by now I guess everyone can be accommodated on campus itself. But the campus is far away from town, to get supplies one needs to travel for 2 KM. Classrooms are of our college are good. Hostels are fine. The hostel Wi-Fi was pretty bad then, and I guess it must have improved now.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for students who can mould themselves into their best selves.
reviews.review_text: Our college is located in the midst of nature, and the college building is beautiful. The college is well-known for it's systematic, well-organised, and the best infrastructure. There were separate floors for each department, but now there are separate blocks for each department. The college library is very big, and it contains a lot of books. Every classroom is well-equipped with projectors, fans, benches, and lights. Labs are also well-maintained. In our college, we have a nice canteen where w...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good engineering college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good. The digital library is available at our college. Students can gain knowledge using these facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied by the college environment and placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, sports, and infrastructure were good. In terms of hostel, the food was not good. Classrooms were pretty clean. Mess food was one of the worst in the college. Hostels were clean but encouraging in extracurricular activities were bad and overall its not good.
